Steve Backshall has two weeks to get ten children trained for a shark dive.

Steve and his trusty crew embark on an epic journey to a remote corner of Norway to experience a very special wildlife spectacle. Each year in November millions of herring pass through this area and deadly predators arent far behind. For the first time ever Steve will be attempting to get in the water with one of these ultimate underwater hunters, the killer whale or orca. But first He needs to find them. Heading out on the fjords, everyones eyes are peeled for the iconic dorsal fin. Reaching the height of Steve, it is hard to miss, and they finally spot a group in the distance. With the whales on the move, its time for Steve to attempt to get his first underwater view of these ultimate animals. But as they are as fast as an Olympic swimmer, keeping up with them is tricky. He finally captures his first underwater glimpse, and the sound of their clicks as they chat away to each other is just beautiful. But Steve wants to do better, and he knows just what to try. The orca in Norway have learnt a very unique way of finding their food: they follow the fishing boats, since where there are fishing boats, there are guaranteed to be herring. To witness this, Steve and the team head out in the dead of night. It wont be easy, though, as so many factors have to come together to make it work: the weather, the animals and the timing of the fishermens catch. The first attempt is a failure, but the team will not give up. As well as the orca mission, Steve and the team get to see the magical northern lights like never before and have an encounter with a mighty humpback they will never forget.

Steered by his 1913 Bradshaws Guide, Michael Portillo returns to Spain to trace the early 20th-century roots of the Spanish Civil War, which divided his Spanish family and sent his father into exile. He discovers a nation fractured at the time by social tensions and regional loyalties, which today offers a rich diversity of cultures to delight the tourist. Special dispensation to fly to the Balearic island of Mallorca allows Michael to spoil himself rotten with spectacularly scenic rides aboard a sublime 1912 vintage railway and a 1913 tram. On his travels, he is trampled underfoot at the bottom of a Catalan people steeple and learns to make the perfect paella. He pays homage to the genius of Barcelonas most famous architect and meets the man responsible for finishing off Antoni Gaudis lifes work. And he discovers a beautiful art nouveau Palace of Music with an emotional history.

Ben journeys to South America to visit Rhona, a British-born actress who left Hollywood to live alone in a remote valley in Uruguay. He learns that a difficult childhood and disillusionment with Tinseltown culture led to his hosts new life. She is now committed to rehabilitating horses and the pair attend an animal auction looking to rescue any mistreated animals. Series/ Exec Prod: Natalie Wilkinson; Prod Co: Renegade Pictures

In this series, Ben joins a variety of brave individuals whove chosen to venture down a very alternative path to everyday life in search of something different, ranging from a former American sports star now living in a log cabin in the mountains, a Hollywood actress whos swapped the bright lights for a horse sanctuary in Uruguay to a British couple living at the top of an Italian mountain and a single dad living homeless in the wilds of Oregon. This week, Ben Fogle heads Down Under to visit Bette, an elderly lady living alone in a ramshackle house in the wilds of northern Queensland. Ben quickly encounters Bettes no-nonsense personality, and her refusal to cook leaves him with no choice but to attempt dinner himself. It doesnt go well. As the week progresses, Bette warms to her guest and explains what drew her to the harsh Australian wilderness 30 years ago. Despite snakes, floods and the isolation, Bette loves her home and reveals that shes been seriously threatened when defending the natural world around her from development. Her complex relationship with men also surprises and saddens Ben. The longer this unlikely pair spend together, the stronger their bond becomes, resulting in heartfelt tears, a lot of laughing and some very dodgy dancing.
The last of the snow melts in Alaska, and residents of the arctic make hay while the midnight sun shines. After a lean winter, Andy Bassich and Denise Becker search for fertile hunting grounds.
Stonehenge, the site whose origins have baffled historians for centuries. Yet now, a discovery on the bed of the Mediterranean sea floor could hold some new clues.

Gregg Wallace and Cherry Healey get exclusive access to some of the biggest factories in Britain to follow the relentless 24 hour production lines that produce our favourite products on an epic scale. Gregg Wallace helps to unload a tanker full of sugar from Norfolk and follows it through one of the oldest sweet factories in Britain to see how over 500 workers, as well as some mind boggling machines, transform it into over a hundred million individual sweets within just 24 hours. Hell discover how this factory that produces Lovehearts could be the most romantic in the world because one in four of the people who work there are in a relationship with each other; how they make 5000 Fizzers a minute using a tablet pressing machine that uses 3 tonnes of pressure to create each sweet; and meets the man in charge of making three quarters of a million Fruity Pop lollies every day. Meanwhile Cherry Healey is let inside the research and development department and experiences for herself how hard it is to come up with a new product, as she attempts to invent her own version of sherbet using citric acid and sodium bicarbonate. She also finds out how they put the letters in seaside rock, by making a giant version and then stretching it to the right size; and is given special access to the Fishermans Friend factory in Lancashire to discover how a local family turned a niche product into a worldwide success. And historian Ruth Goodman investigates how sweets were first invented and discovers that, in the Middle Ages, they were used as a medicine and thought to reduce flatulence. Shell also find out about the human cost of Britains sweet tooth in the 18th century and how an abolition movement instigated a sugar boycott which helped to end the slave trade.

Kaheksa miljardit inimest on umber kujundanud 80% maailma maismaast, aga meie kõrval elab ka terve hulk muid liike. Bali makaagid on õppinud turistidelt napatuid esemeid toidu vastu vahetama. Austraalias elavad konnkurgud kasutavad saagi hõlpsamaks leidmiseks ara tanavavalgustust. Kuigi nemad ja hulk teisigi liike saavad inimeste maailmas hasti hakkama, oleme me paljudes kohtades loodusele koormaks ja looduse havimisel võivad olla kurvad tagajarjed ka inimkonnale.

With Bradshaws 1913 Continental Railway Guide in hand, Michael Portillo ventures east through Romania. He encounters a bloodsucking vampire in Transylvania and brown bears in the Carpathian forest before visiting a fairy-tale castle with modern conveniences in Sinaia, striking oil in Ploesti, tapping into the nations musical soul in Bucharest and loading cargo from a 100-foot crane in Constanta. Travelling through what was, at the turn of the 20th century, one of Europes youngest nations, Michael sinks his teeth into a Victorian gothic best-seller and uncovers an unlikely fellow fan of his Bradshaws.
As winter closes in, the quest for sustenance becomes essential as four Alaskans fight to stay ahead of the season.
A couple from Salt Lake City, Utah, decide to move to the mountainous coast of Shelter Cove, California.
The Empire of the Ancient Greeks has long been of interest and fascination. Now, an incredible hoard of treasures discovered in an ancient grave is sheddding new light on their civilisation.
A behind-the-scenes look at the series that explores the most successful animal group on Earth, from the tiny Etruscan shrew to the largest mammal in existence - the blue whale.

Narrated by Michael Palin, this fascinating series follows the incredible life cycle of trees. In the final episode: whether a trees lifespan is a hundred or a thousand years, eventually it reaches the end of its story and dies. But for trees, the end of one life can mean the beginning of another. In this episode, we discover how trees can extend their lives by walking across the land and planting new roots, how they can learn from trauma, and how a decaying tree has the miraculous ability to nurture new life. In Scotland, Tony Kirkham explores a magical collection of Yew trees - the UKs longest living trees. These gnarled beauties create cathedral-like caves under their canopies and Tony reveals how a Yew can re-root its sprawling branches, allowing it to walk across the ground when the original trunk dies. Heading to warmer climes, we meet Antonio Antico, whose family have farmed olives for many generations. He reveals that for a tree, aging doesnt always mean slowing down, and that his ancient twisting trees are producing more olives than ever. There are trees on Earth that are nearly 5000 years old, and there are forests in Britain that have ancient origins. We meet Kylie Jones-Mattock in north-west Wales as she reveals the lush beauty of a temperate rainforest, an ancient habitat where unique flora and fauna are able to thrive. From old forests to prehistoric predators, Tony Kirkham explores a grove of Monkey Puzzle trees in Scotland, where he explains that the unusual, scale-like leaves of this prickly species are an adaptation to protect it from hungry dinosaurs! Just like us, trees can experience hardship and trauma – but how does it impact them? Professor Mary Gagen from Swansea University studies tree rings, the circular patterns inside a tree trunk that are formed as the tree grows. She demonstrates how to core a tree in order to get a glimpse of its life story and reveals how a tree can learn from the trauma it experiences. No matter how many trials and disasters an old tree survives, eventually it reaches the end of its life. So how do trees die? One answer is from disease, and we meet Kerry Pickett and Peter Small in Brighton who are among the people fighting to save local elm trees from Dutch Elm disease. Finally, we journey to Betchworth Estate in Surrey to meet earth scientist Cecilia Reed as she looks for trees that have died. She reveals the incredible final gifts that dead trees can offer, as food and habitat for many creatures; Incredibly, 40 per cent of our woodland wildlife depends on dead wood. But most importantly of all, Cecilia explains that a dead tree left to decompose will break down and eventually restore its nutrients back into the soil, providing the perfect environment for the next generation of trees to grow and thrive.
David Harewood and best friend Fraser James swap the sets of Hollywood for a new challenge in Slovenia where they face some of the most dangerous roads in Europe.

Ben makes an unprecedented third visit to see his old friends Bill and Bob, elderly twins living in the canyons of . During his previous stays, Ben quickly learned that nothing was quite as it seemed with his eccentric hosts. His home for the week was a cave. He discovered that the brothers were preppers, with several years worth of supplies hidden in their caves. He also learned that Bob had suffered a stroke and on this visit is saddened to see that his condition has not improved with age. Ben also observes that their paranoia about the outside world has grown. He reassures them that life away from their caves might not be as they perceive.
Two world-leading projects designed to tackle the crises facing Earths rivers come under the spotlight.

Michael Portillo embarks on a scenic, thousand-mile rail journey from the Swedish capital, Stockholm, to Abisko in the northern reaches of the Arctic Circle. Steered by his 1936 edition of Bradshaws Continental Railway Guide, Michael boards a steam train to celebrate Midsummer in Marielund, learns to decorate a Dala horse in Mora and takes an icy dip in one of the countrys 96,000 lakes. In Stockholm, Michael braves a precarious tour of the city from its rooftops before boarding a heritage tram to get the lowdown on 1930s Sweden from an expert. At the capitals Royal Institute of Technology, Michael investigates the transport of the future in a near-vacuum tube. He tours Uppsala University and takes Swedens 1,300km Inlandsbanan railway, which was completed in 1937, to travel north to Ostersund and Kiruna. Michael finishes deep in the Arctic Circle at a remote climate research station, where scientists are building on data recorded at the time his guidebook was published. En route, Michael learns why Sweden built the strategic inland railway on which he is travelling. He discovers how the nation created a welfare state, has lunch with traditional Sami people in Vilhelmina and checks into a chilly hotel made of ice.

programmes.t: Wonders of Volcanoes with Dara O Briain
programmes.d: Dara begins with a mission to uncover the inner workings of volcanoes as his journey starts in Sicily, home to the mighty Mount Etna - Europes largest and most active volcano.

Steve starts his South African adventure in one of the weirdest places he has ever gone looking for animals - a power station, in the dark! He is staking out the location for a little big cat that has so far eluded the Deadly 60 - the serval. After a couple of failed attempts to find one, including an unfortunate crash with a camera drone and Steve getting covered in thorns, Steve and the crew film a serval hunting rodents right in front of them, showing off the cats amazing radar ears and lethal pounce. The serval finally gains a well-deserved place on Steves list! South Africa is home to some of the worlds deadliest snakes and Steve has three fangy contenders vying for the title of Deadly Champ of Chomp! First up is an African rock python, owner of more than 100 rearward-pointing teeth for gripping its prey. Next is the Mozambique spitting cobra with its highly specialised fangs for launching venom at high speed. But the crown goes to the mighty gaboon viper, a snake superstar and owner of the longest fangs of any snake. Out in the bush, Steve goes on the trail of the elusive golden baboon spider with the help of some local school kids. The baboon spider is a gentle giant of an arachnid that is under threat from illegal collecting for the pet trade. Steve uses a special camera called an endoscope to observe one in its burrow before tempting it out to meet the boys and show off its huge fangs. Spiders are a mainstay of the Deadly 60 - will this one make the grade?

Gregg Wallace joins a human production line in the largest sports shoe factory in the UK to see how they produce three and a half thousand pairs of trainers every 24 hours by sewing 32 million individual stiches and using 140 miles of thread. Hell make his own pair of shoes and discover how they put together 27 different pieces made from 8 different materials which require auto and manual stitching and finishing with a "roughening" robot and a hot oven. Hell also meet the man who comes up with new designs, including trainers inspired by the three most popular pub names in England. Meanwhile Cherry Healey gets hands on in a tannery to help them process thousands of rawhides into finished leather for the nations shoes, and finds out how a ballet shoe company painstakingly turn 37,000 square meters of satin into a quarter of a million ballet shoes - some of which only last for one performance. She also gets to design her own court shoes at Cordwainers College in London where she learns how to turn creative ideas into commercial products: last year sales of womens designer shoes topped 532 million pounds. And historian Ruth Goodman reveals how, when the sewing machine was first introduced into shoe factories in the mid 19th century, traditional shoemakers went on strike, rebelling against joining a restrictive production line. She also traces the surprising origins of the humble trainer to the back streets of Bolton where Joe Foster invented his running spike in 1895, above his fathers sweet shop and discovers that Reebok trainers were originally British.

Naeme tublisid looduskaitsjaid, kes võitlevad meie imelise planeedi tuleviku eest. Naeme pingutusi teravmokk-ninasarviku, Lõuna-Ameerika haruldaste konnade, elevantide, kaljuiibiste ja Amazonase vihmametsade kaitsmiseks.

Michael Portillo uses his 1913 Bradshaws Continental Railway guide to complete his journey through Switzerland. En route, he is caught up in a war zone with the Red Cross, takes to the skies in a vintage bi-plane and tries his hand at watchmaking, James Bond style. Fortified by railway wine and Swiss fondue, Michael makes his way to the capital, Bern, where in a 1930s bi-plane, he follows in the slipstream of the Swiss pilot Oskar Bider, first to fly across the Alps. At Biel or Bienne, Michael tries his hand at watchmaking and learns how a timekeeping innovation by Omega became indispensable in the trenches of the First World War. Arriving in Geneva, Michael is thrust into tense conflict training at a military checkpoint as he explores the citys famously international character, beginning with the International Committee for the Red Cross.
Ben spends time with Pirate Rob, who lives for half the year with his 18-year-old son Damien in a sandbag house on an island in the middle of an industrial river in Oregon.
With the defeat of the Roman Empire came huge battles. But recent discoveries have found a cemetary filled with strangely shaped skulls belonging to a mysterious tribe.
A behind-the-scenes look at the series that explores the most successful animal group on Earth, from the tiny Etruscan shrew to the largest mammal in existence - the blue whale.
Rhod Gilbert presents a selection of some of the funniest and most dramatic moments from the series.
Jess Fostekew and her good friend and fellow comedian Desiree Burch take on an utterly insane trip across Colorados Rocky Mountains in a Wild West adventure.
Ben Fogle meets a Brit who now lives in the Arctic Circle.
Rhod Gilbert presents a selection of some of the funniest and most dramatic moments from the series.
Robson Green walks a beautiful but lesser-known route in the Douro Valley in Northern Portugal, rich in ancient art, wildlife and world-famous wine.

Pakane paugub ning Beck ja Dene suunduvad kulmunud jarvele, et oma naljastele kelgukoertele varsket kala puuda. Ühes kuus pistavad koerad nahka 300 suurt kala ning puuda tuleb palju. Kulma on 40 kraadi ning võrgud tuleb panna rohkem kui meetrise jaa alla. Põhja-Ontarios tuleb Bentleyl paksus lumes labida lõputuid kilomeetreid ning uletada ohtlikke takistusi. Lisaks otsustab ta võtta ette 40 km pikkuse teekonna, et vedada 200-kilone kalapaat labi paksu metsa. Kim ja Pierre ei raiska samuti aega. Nad teevad tutvust ohtliku ahmiga, keda huutakse ka põhjamaa kuradiks.

News presenter Katty Kay keeps you up to date with all the latest breaking news from America and the rest of the world on BBC World News America. This world renowned news and current affairs program has been recognised for its exceptional reporting at the Emmy Awards. BBC World News America won two Emmy awards for its coverage of the conflicts in Syria and the Central African Republic. You can catch up with this award winning broadcast team as they air multiple times a day throughout the week.

In-depth news and current affairs review of the main political and economic stories of the day, featuring robust interviews with senior government and opposition figures, business and union leaders, and analytical reports that delve behind the headlines. Regular presenters cross-examine studio guests on details of policies, priorities, actions and inactions, on a range of domestic UK and international topics. There are weekly features on the arts, sports and the world of technology, and editors are not afraid to venture into niche, specialist and exotic areas from space travel to animal psychology. If the BBCs flagship Radio 4 Today programme sets the early morning news agenda for the day, then its late-night TV equivalent often gives the people in power some sleepless nights.

The latest news from the BBC,which is designed to inform you on current affairs. The BBC is aims to be a totally impartial public service broadcaster, and was established by Royal Charter. The BBC is funded by a licence fee paid by British households, and is regulated by Ofcom. They aim to create high-quality content, in order to inform and educate, but also entertain, their audience Millions of people from all over the world watch content produced by the BBC, and they are well respected as a media company. It was founded in 1922, with its headquarters in Westminster, London.

Join BBC journalists including political editor Laura Kuenssberg, Europe editor Katya Adler, Brussels correspondent Adam Fleming and political correspondent Chris Mason in their weekly podcast discussing all of the news stories that matter to the people of the United Kingdom. The journalists know all about the stories that theyre talking about - they interview the most important people involved in the stories that feature in the news. They speak of their knowledge and understanding of the news in a way that is understandable for all. Laura is often in a car in the middle of a city where big politics stories are happening. Katya, Adam and Chris are usually in the studio. They regularly talk about Brexit and what is going to happen when the United Kingdom leaves the European Union.

Nick Kwek visits the National Space Industry Hub in Sydney.

"Good Morning Asia, hello World." Join the news teams from BBC World News in London and Singapore. This live news and current affairs program is broadcast globally and focuses on all the latest news and breaking developing stories that matter around the world. The show is usually presented by Rico Hizon in Singapore and Kasia Madera in London. Broadcasting live at midnight GMT on both BBC World News and the BBC News channel, the show is broadcast in the morning in Asia and therefore is marketed as a morning show for people watching around the country. The show is often followed by Asia Business Report live from Singapore which reports on all the latest economy and business figures from the country.
The latest business news from Singapore and around the world.

News presenter Katty Kay keeps you up to date with all the latest breaking news from America and the rest of the world on BBC World News America. This world renowned news and current affairs program has been recognised for its exceptional reporting at the Emmy Awards. BBC World News America won two Emmy awards for its coverage of the conflicts in Syria and the Central African Republic. You can catch up with this award winning broadcast team as they air multiple times a day throughout the week.

In-depth news and current affairs review of the main political and economic stories of the day, featuring robust interviews with senior government and opposition figures, business and union leaders, and analytical reports that delve behind the headlines. Regular presenters cross-examine studio guests on details of policies, priorities, actions and inactions, on a range of domestic UK and international topics. There are weekly features on the arts, sports and the world of technology, and editors are not afraid to venture into niche, specialist and exotic areas from space travel to animal psychology. If the BBCs flagship Radio 4 Today programme sets the early morning news agenda for the day, then its late-night TV equivalent often gives the people in power some sleepless nights.

Join BBC journalists including political editor Laura Kuenssberg, Europe editor Katya Adler, Brussels correspondent Adam Fleming and political correspondent Chris Mason in their weekly podcast discussing all of the news stories that matter to the people of the United Kingdom. The journalists know all about the stories that theyre talking about - they interview the most important people involved in the stories that feature in the news. They speak of their knowledge and understanding of the news in a way that is understandable for all. Laura is often in a car in the middle of a city where big politics stories are happening. Katya, Adam and Chris are usually in the studio. They regularly talk about Brexit and what is going to happen when the United Kingdom leaves the European Union.

"Good Morning Asia, hello World." Join the news teams from BBC World News in London and Singapore. This live news and current affairs program is broadcast globally and focuses on all the latest news and breaking developing stories that matter around the world. The show is usually presented by Rico Hizon in Singapore and Kasia Madera in London. Broadcasting live at midnight GMT on both BBC World News and the BBC News channel, the show is broadcast in the morning in Asia and therefore is marketed as a morning show for people watching around the country. The show is often followed by Asia Business Report live from Singapore which reports on all the latest economy and business figures from the country.

Join the Travel Show team as they take you on a criss-cross journey across the globe, visiting the most popular holiday destinations as well as sampling some hidden gems. They aim to create high-quality content, in order to inform and educate, but also entertain, their audience Millions of people from all over the world watch content produced by the BBC, and they are well respected as a media company. It was founded in 1922, with its headquarters in Westminster, London.

Join the Travel Show team as they take you on a criss-cross journey across the globe, visiting the most popular holiday destinations as well as sampling some hidden gems. The itinerary includes up-and-coming hot spots for holidaymakers and uncovering some lesser-known facts about places on many peoples bucket lists. This BBC programme takes you to every corner of the planet, providing an all-round insight into the world of travel. From winter wonderland activities such as eco skiing in Denmark and trekking across glaciers in Iceland, to warmer destinations as diverse as Rwanda and the Great Barrier Reef in Australia, your adventure starts here.

Focus on Africa is a BBC news program broadcast globally and on local partner channels of the BBC in African countries. The program used to be presented by Komla Dumor each weekday from its inception until his death in 2014; now it is hosted by Sophie Ikenye, a news presenter from Kenya. The program includes news, sport and business from across Africa and the rest of the globe. Get the top African stories and keep up with the latest international events.

News presenter Katty Kay keeps you up to date with all the latest breaking news from America and the rest of the world on BBC World News America. This world renowned news and current affairs program has been recognised for its exceptional reporting at the Emmy Awards. BBC World News America won two Emmy awards for its coverage of the conflicts in Syria and the Central African Republic. You can catch up with this award winning broadcast team as they air multiple times a day throughout the week.

On Talking Business BBC presenters, based in the worlds most dynamic cities, discuss with the most important and influential people from the world of business and finance, the key issues of the day. Corporate leaders, global investors, top creatives, cutting-edge entrepreneurs and leading intellectuals gather together weekly to discuss and analyse the issues and trends that most affect how business has to work in todays world. Our team of presenters are experts on the issues and developments which are shaping the way we work, consume and live in the 21st Century.

programmes.t: The Amazing World of Gumball Single Story
programmes.d: Gumball and Darwin argue with the Internet and make him mad. So mad in fact that he seeks to wipe out humanity and, whilst doing so, malfunctions! The whole of Elmore is plunged into a time before technology. Its actually pretty nice. Will Gumball and Darwin decide to leave the internet unplugged?

programmes.t: The Amazing World of Gumball Single Story
programmes.d: Gumball and Darwin learn that Hector is not so happy being giant-sized. So they decide to help him by creating a potion that will shrink him down to the size of an average person. However creating a magic potion is not as easy as it sounds, and the results can go spectacularly wrong...

programmes.t: The Amazing World of Gumball Single Story
programmes.d: Nicole arranges a playdate for Anais with the son of a classy lady she met at the supermarket. / Richard has lost all of the familys money. Nicole is happy for the Wattersons to appear in a Joyful Burger commercial for some much needed cash. / Darwin joins the school marching band and his tin-whistle talent lands him the solo. / Rob creates a variety of spinoff Elmore shows and formats in order to replace Gumball.

programmes.t: The Amazing World of Gumball Single Story
programmes.d: Pennys family are unhappy that shes decided to come out of her shell… literally. And Penny wants her family to come out of their shell...also literally. They are at an impasse so who do they turn to in their time of trouble? Gumball of course! Needless to say he is way outside of his comfort zone...

programmes.t: The Amazing World of Gumball Single Story
programmes.d: Gumball and Darwin find themselves in serious trouble when they agree to everything the new kid in school says. The truth is they cant understand a word that he says. Peter Pepperoni has been home schooled and developed a very odd way of speaking. Due to a series of misunderstandings Gumball and Darwin end up on the run from the law.

programmes.t: The Amazing World of Gumball Single Story
programmes.d: To make ends meet, the Wattersons are forced to rent out their house. However with nowhere else to stay they decide to secretly remain at the house. When they accidentally surprise their guests, an elderly pair of fainting goats, they faint...unsurprisingly. The Wattersons fear the worst and attempt to cover up this "accident".

programmes.t: The Amazing World of Gumball Single Story
programmes.d: Gumball and Darwin get caught in the middle of a trash can war between Richard and Mr. Robinson. / Gumball and Darwin are invited to a high school party, and have to bring a date! / Granny Jojo has brought a boyfriend to her birthday meal and Dad isnt happy about it. / Gumball and Darwin accidentally create a loveable monster that eats their family.

programmes.t: The Amazing World of Gumball Single Story
programmes.d: Miss Simian discovers a failed test from Gumballs past that brings down his grade point average. This means he has to retake kindergarten all over again, much to her delight. But by demoting him Miss Simian has inadvertently brought herself down, and theyre left with no choice but to team up if they want things back to normal.

programmes.t: The Amazing World of Gumball Single Story
programmes.d: Gumball and Darwin discover the reason Dads diet wasnt working was that he was actually on ten diets: and eating a meal for each of them. They eventually manage to help him lose weight, but Richards newfound buffness also brings out his more obnoxious side.

programmes.t: The Amazing World of Gumball Single Story
programmes.d: Gumball discovers that Rob, his old nemesis, is "neme-seeing" someone else now. Devastated that Rob has fallen out of hate with him, Gumball refuses to accept that his ex-nemesis has moved on and does his best to sabotage Robs blossoming relationship with his new foe, Banana Joe.

programmes.t: The Amazing World of Gumball Single Story
programmes.d: When they see the school bullies making fun of Sussie Gumball and Darwin decide to try and help her act less weird. They carefully observe her behavior and decide that the only thing they have to change is absolutely everything.

programmes.t: The Amazing World of Gumball Single Story
programmes.d: The Wattersons complain about their day and order a pizza from Larry... / The citizens of Elmore are feeling down because its January, so Gumball and Anais invent a new holiday called Sluzzle Tag. / In Biology class, Gumball and Darwin are waiting for a butterfly to emerge from its chrysalis. / After Gumball and Darwin have too much sugary cereal they begin thinking about the mysteries of the universe. / Gumball, Darwin and Anais discover that Banana Joes mom paints pictures which predict the future. / When Mr Small shows a health and safety video in class, Darwin becomes obsessed with the idea of keeping the Wattersons safe. / Anais throws a party but no-one shows up as she has no friends or social skills. / Alan is so good-natured that Gumball feels compelled to make him lose his temper. / Things arent going Gumballs way at school so he assumes there must be a Secret Society...

programmes.t: The Amazing World of Gumball Single Story
programmes.d: The Amazing World of Gumball revolves around the life of Gumball Watterson, a 12-year-old cat who attends middle school in the fictional city of Elmore. Accompanied by his adoptive goldfish brother and best friend Darwin, he frequently finds himself involved in various shenanigans around the city, during which he interacts with his other family members - sister Anais and parents Nicole and Richard - and an extended supporting cast of characters. With relatable themes and a unique cast of characters, The Amazing World of Gumball exemplifies the funny, amazing, sweet and optimistic side of kids everyday life. Injected with a good deal of humor and unpredictable nonsense, Gumballs world reflects the modern family and everyday issues that kids understand.

programmes.t: The Amazing World of Gumball Single Story
programmes.d: The Wattersons run out of money and are torn between being broke and selling out. Nicole is happy for the Wattersons to appear in a Joyful Burger commercial for some much needed cash. Gumball protests as he is convinced its selling out.

programmes.t: The Amazing World of Gumball Single Story
programmes.d: Dad has to make the kids on time for their first day back at school. But hes overslept and now he cant find Gumball, Darwin or Anais anywhere. He sets about retracing his steps from the day before, to work out where they might be. When he finally figures out where they are, its a race against time to rescue them and prove to himself - and Mum - that hes not a bad father.

programmes.t: The Amazing World of Gumball Single Story
programmes.d: Gumball and Darwin discover that Rob, who once swore to wreak vengeance on them, has been trying to destroy them for some time. But his traps never work. Taking pity on him, the kids make it their mission to help Rob become a better nemesis. But they do their job too well, creating a super-villain they may not be able to control.

programmes.t: The Amazing World of Gumball Single Story
programmes.d: When Gumball and Darwin decide its time they join a crew, they agree that the coolest posse in Elmore is the senior citizens. They do everything they can to fit in with them, going to extraordinary lengths to prove themselves worthy of running with them.

programmes.t: The Amazing World of Gumball Single Story
programmes.d: Gumball and Darwin are shocked to realise that their class isnt the only one in Elmore Junior High. / Dad discovers that Granny Jojo and Louie plan to get married and move to Florida. To stop this happening he adopts Louie so that he can forbid him from marrying Granny Jojo. / After they receive an extravagant invitation to Masamis birthday party Gumball and Darwin are anxious to find just the right gift for her. However theyre not the only ones. / Gumball sets out to prove to Pennys father that hes good enough for his daughter. Director: Mic Graves,.

programmes.t: The Amazing World of Gumball Single Story
programmes.d: Dad discovers that Granny Jojo and Louie plan to get married and move to Florida. To stop this happening he adopts Louie so that he can forbid him from marrying Granny Jojo. / After they receive an extravagant invitation to Masamis birthday party, Gumball and Darwin are anxious to find just the right gift for her. / Gumball decides that the best way to prove to Mr. Fitzgerald that hes good enough for Penny is to become his apprentice for the day.

programmes.t: The Amazing World of Gumball Single Story
programmes.d: After they receive an extravagant invitation to Masamis birthday party, Gumball and Darwin are anxious to find just the right gift for her. However, theyre not the only ones: it turns out every kid in Elmore is competing to get Masami the perfect present. When Gumball and Darwin decide to think outside the box, their unusual gift is a big surprise, but not a good one.

programmes.t: The Amazing World of Gumball Single Story
programmes.d: Gumball decides that the best way to prove to Mr. Fitzgerald that hes good enough for Penny is to become his apprentice for the day. The problem is, Mr. Fitzgerald has an important interview and Gumballs enthusiastic attempts to help him might actually do more harm than good, both to Mr. Fitzgeralds business and to Gumballs future with Penny.

programmes.t: The Amazing World of Gumball Single Story
programmes.d: When Grandpa Louie gives them a cheque, the Watterson kids argue over how to spend the money. / When they find Anais training herself for a brutal showdown Gumball and Darwin realise that their sister is being pestered at school by an annoying kid: Billy. / An impromptu hug with a stranger at school leaves Gumball in an increasingly awkward social situation. / Mom and the kids depart for their hard days work leaving a seemingly lazy Dad half-asleep on the sofa. Mom has given him one very simple job: buy mayonnaise. Director: Mic Graves,.

programmes.t: The Amazing World of Gumball Single Story
programmes.d: When Grandpa Louie gives them a cheque, the Watterson kids argue over how to spend the money. / When they find Anais training herself for a brutal showdown Gumball and Darwin realise that their sister is being pestered at school by an annoying kid: Billy. Director: Mic Graves,.

programmes.t: The Amazing World of Gumball Single Story
programmes.d: When Darwin has lunch with Idaho he decides to stop eating potatoes in solidarity with his brotato. However he finds his obsession with his favourite food harder to kick than he ever imagined, so Gumball decides to help his friend curb his carb cravings.

programmes.t: The Amazing World of Gumball Single Story
programmes.d: Gumball kind of teaches Darwin how to be a skater… / Darwin finds it harder than expected to give up his favourite foodstuff. / Gumball becomes a sorcerers apprentice / Gumball Darwin and Anais find themselves plunged into an RPG version of Elmore.

programmes.t: The Amazing World of Gumball Single Story
programmes.d: When Gumball is given a cursed video-game console Elmore becomes trapped inside a fantasy RPG world. Gumball, Darwin and Anais have to battle their way through town, unravelling the secrets of their new virtual reality. But theyll have to level up if theyre going to stand any chance against the mysterious final boss...

programmes.t: The Amazing World of Gumball Single Story
programmes.d: The family go to visit Richards Dad. Based on his basic living standards and extended absence from Richards life, they assume Frankie must have done a stretch in the slammer. When Frankie comes to stay with the Wattersons, they decide the way to make him comfortable is to make him uncomfortable and turn their house into a prison.

programmes.t: The Amazing World of Gumball Single Story
programmes.d: Gumball and Darwin are confused when they meet Kiki and Quack, a pair of siblings that copy everything they do and say. Then they find out this copycat family is making money online from imitating the Watterson family! When they fail to encourage them to find their own identity, the Wattersons realise they need a more permanent solution...

programmes.t: The Amazing World of Gumball Single Story
programmes.d: When Gumball and Darwin realise Grandpa Louie has no friends on Elmore Plus, they feel bad. So they create one - called Muriel. However when Granny Jojo finds out Louie has been spending time online with another woman, Muriel not existing isnt going to stop her being destroyed.

programmes.t: The Amazing World of Gumball Single Story
programmes.d: The Wattersons discover a family of cartoon copycats who mimic their every move. / Grandpa Louie has a new online friend - the only problem is she isnt real. / The kids find out that Richard has been being picked on by the same person since high school. / Gumball and Darwin decide to use online reviews to wrangle free stuff. / A mysterious package shows up at the Wattersons house and they do their best to avoid opening it. / Darwin likes a girl in his class so Gumball decides its time to play cupid. / Gumballs smart answers arent the correct ones and hes forced to go back to kindergarten. / Gumball and Darwin discover the real reason Dads diet wasnt working. / Gumball discovers that Rob his old nemesis is neme-seeing someone else now.

programmes.t: The Amazing World of Gumball Single Story
programmes.d: When Dad gives Larrys Hairdressers a bad review for saying hes bald, he gets offered a free haircut. This inspires Gumball and Darwin to go on a reviewing-spree across town, forcing Larry to give them stuff with the threat of a bad review. Just because the customer is always right doesnt mean that what theyre doing isnt wrong.

programmes.t: The Amazing World of Gumball Single Story
programmes.d: The Wattersons receive an unmarked package in the mail. To distract themselves from the urge to open it, they all take turns to imagine what it might contain. To Mom it could mean financial freedom, to Gumball it could mean superpowers: to whoever its actually for, it means theyre not getting their package.

programmes.t: The Amazing World of Gumball Single Story
programmes.d: Gumball and Darwin get caught in the middle of a trash can war between Richard and Mr. Robinson. / Gumball and Darwin are invited to a high school party, and have to bring a date! / Granny Jojo has brought a boyfriend to her birthday meal and Dad isnt happy about it. / Gumball and Darwin accidentally create a loveable monster that eats their family.

programmes.t: The Amazing World of Gumball Single Story
programmes.d: Miss Simian discovers a failed test from Gumballs past that brings down his grade point average. This means he has to retake kindergarten all over again, much to her delight. But by demoting him Miss Simian has inadvertently brought herself down, and theyre left with no choice but to team up if they want things back to normal.

Specs will never learn about watching horror movies before bed. He can never sleep afterwards. He jumps at every strange noise - including the ones Skinnys making downstairs, as he blends up a smoothie IN HIS SLEEP. Skinny sleepwalks into trouble all night, and with Specs gibbering in terror, it falls to Lamput to keep the slumbering nerd out of trouble. Apparently you shouldnt wake sleepwalkers. Turning into a rubber band and flinging them at the moon? Thats fine.

programmes.t: The Amazing World of Gumball Single Story
programmes.d: Gumball and Darwin discover the reason Dads diet wasnt working was that he was actually on ten diets: and eating a meal for each of them. They eventually manage to help him lose weight, but Richards newfound buffness also brings out his more obnoxious side.

programmes.t: The Wonderfully Weird World of Gumball
programmes.d: Nicole wants a new family portrait where everyones entire face is in the photo and theyre all smiling.

programmes.t: The Wonderfully Weird World of Gumball
programmes.d: The Wattersons must get Anais to Daisyland before the park closes for good.

programmes.t: The Amazing World of Gumball Single Story
programmes.d: Nothing much is happening for Gumball and Darwin and the background characters in Elmore seize their moment. An array of diverse characters you may have noticed lurking in the background of Gumball and Darwins adventures finally let their voices be heard. A series of sketches include some tennis crowd extras, two pizzas in love and The Bacon Guy.

programmes.t: The Amazing World of Gumball Single Story
programmes.d: Gumball is in such a bad mood that it spreads to Darwin, who joins him in complaining about everything. Their constant moaning grabs the attention of the good people of Elmore. Mistaking Gumball and Darwin for genuine kids in need, they put on a benefit and raise money for them. How do Gumball and Darwin confess theres been a mix-up without inciting a riot?!!

programmes.t: The Amazing World of Gumball Single Story
programmes.d: For once in his life Gumball is the one whos owed an apology. / Gumball and Darwin befriend Clayton who is a compulsive liar and begins contaminating them with lies. / The Wattersons run over Santa Claus and must save Christmas.

programmes.t: The Amazing World of Gumball Single Story
programmes.d: When Gumball and Darwin discover his diploma is fake, Principal Brown is determined to keep their discovery a secret. He offers them all sorts of "incentives" to keep quiet but the truth is they really dont care whether the diploma is real or not. Mistaking their disinterest as "playing hard to get" Principal Brown resorts to increasingly desperate measures to ensure Gumball and Darin play ball.

programmes.t: The Wonderfully Weird World of Gumball
programmes.d: After tasting Masamis gourmet, double-truffle mac-n-cheese at lunch, Gumball decides to do whatever it takes to get a full serving of the delicious meal.

programmes.t: The Wonderfully Weird World of Gumball
programmes.d: Gumball wants to take down Miss Simian after she punishes him for not respecting his school-provided calculator.

programmes.t: The Amazing World of Gumball Single Story
programmes.d: Gumball and Darwin start noticing small details around Elmore High that dont add up. They come to the conclusion that Molly has disappeared, even though nobody else remembers her ever having existed. Mr Small confirms their suspicions and tells them that things are not always what they seem in Elmore. They set off on a quest to rescue Molly in an alternate dimension, and soon need rescuing themselves!

programmes.t: The Amazing World of Gumball Single Story
programmes.d: After a health scare the kids decide to reunite Mr Robinson with his son. Mr Robinson has always seen Rocky as a disappointment so when Gumball and Darwin help him land a corporate job at Chanax, he is thrilled. However the Chanax corporation is not quite what it seems. Can Gumball and Darwin rescue Rocky before he becomes a corporate drone for all eternity?

When the crew dock at the Guild for a ship inspection, Lana and Boreas are in charge of keeping the Mighty Windbreaker pristine while the crew go ashore for various errands. The two kids try to spruce up the boat, only to leave it a wreck in a series of mishaps and cons by Trash Imp. Now Lana and Bo must race around Weymouth to repair the Windbreaker before Andar and crew return with Admiral Lovejoy.

When Lana wants to steer the Mighty Windbreaker, Andar makes up a bogus rule that you need to have a beard before taking on such responsibilities. So Lana finds one, but its got a mind of its own. Lana and Andar must find common ground before the beard and its previous owner steal their ship.
When the library is thrown into disarray, an ancient ghost is awoken. / Kelsey and Stacks write a story for book club, which turns out to be more personal than Kelsey realized.

When the Stump Kids encounter a village that follows role-playing game logic, its mayor reveals that they have a piece of the cube and Omar uses his gaming knowledge to help the group - Craig then realises that Omar does not know what to do with himself now that he is no longer the Green Poncho and so decides to help him overcome his inertia.

Craig, Jessica and Bernard accidentally lock themselves out of the house when trying to get car keys and trying to meet up with the rest of the Williams family - they go to Alexis and Kelseys house to get a spare set but fail to do so, and when Jessica reveals that she has hidden a spare set in their gutter and goes to get it, she ends up accidentally destroying their car!

The Stump Kids seek Kenneths help but find an annoyed Xavier instead - they visit the Elders who were once friends with Kenneth and David calls him, but Mark gets into an argument over how much he has changed. When David and Barry leave and the kids have no answer, they watch Kenneths anime, realise that the Heart of the Forest is from the show, and vow to find it... but all while unaware that Xavier is spying on them with his drones.
Robin teaches the Titans how to use a ruler.
When Cyborg and Starfire need appliance repair help, they call the Hero Hotline, a unique trio of superheroes.

programmes.t: The Wonderfully Weird World of Gumball
programmes.d: During a heatwave, Richard recruits the kids to help him sneak into the Robinsons new above-ground pool.

programmes.t: The Wonderfully Weird World of Gumball
programmes.d: Gumball vows to wear a shell and partake in strange Fitzgerald traditions, in order to help Penny get through a tense family birthday party with ease.

programmes.t: The Amazing World of Gumball Single Story
programmes.d: After Gumball convinces himself that Penny doesnt love him as much as she used to, he decides to put together a romantic quest to remind her of all the good times theyve had together. But Gumballs romantic gesture backfires, landing Penny - and maybe their relationship - in serious peril.

programmes.t: The Amazing World of Gumball Single Story
programmes.d: Gumball and Darwin try to tear themselves away from the internet, but end up falling down the Elmore Stream-hole. / Gumball and Darwin try to find a single nice quality about their neighbour, Mrs Robinson. Director: Mic Graves,.
When a magic trick goes sideways, Duncan makes a great escape and Harold becomes the target of a Sorcerer Hunt!
When Courtney gets the old, gross daycare carpet replaced with a new one, the resulting static electricity has unexpected consequences.
After accidentally swallowing a piece of gum Owen has to protect his friends by jumping into gum volcano.
Chef warns Beth and Cody making goofy faces into a mirror will cause them to get stuck that way. It turns out he was right, just not in the way any of them ever imagined.
After Codys best friend doll breaks on their watch, Owen and Beth put themselves in grave danger while trying to do the right thing.

Animated comedy following the adventures of Craig and his two friends Kelsey and JP as they explore the wilderness of the creek together. The Stump Kids invite the rest of the Council to meet Omar the Green Poncho, who reveals his origin story and how he teamed up with the original Green Poncho and trained under her tutelage to protect the Overpass. Omar still wants to be friends with Maya and attempts to reconnect with her, but King Xavier then reveals something that ruins the occasion...

Animated comedy following the adventures of Craig and his two friends Kelsey and JP as they explore the wilderness of the creek together. It is a chilly day at the Creek, and that means that Craigs mum must force him to wear his winter gear - not wanting to wear something that he finds constrictive, Craig slowly begins to remove every important article of clothing that is keeping him warm, but when it is time to go home for dinner, he must rush to find his winter gear before he freezes...

Animated comedy following the adventures of Craig and his two friends Kelsey and JP as they explore the wilderness of the creek together. The Stump Kids imagine an alternate reality where they are not friends - in an alternate version of Itch to Explore, Craig is a member of the Junior Forest Scouts, Kelsey and a rat Mortimor are members of the Ninja Kids, and JP is with the Paintball Kids. Dissatisfied with their groups, they team up to explore some poison ivy in the centre of the Creek...

Animated comedy following the adventures of Craig and his two friends Kelsey and JP as they explore the wilderness of the creek together. Craig is hoping for a snow day but is told that there will only be a two-hour delay at school instead, so he and his friends ask the Witches of the Creek for help where they ask for items in exchange for a full-on snow day - as they go to retrieve the requested items, Craig learns that Bernard has lost all hopes for a snow day and tries to cheer him up.

With Andars frustration growing after a series of failed quests, Lana hatches a plan to stage a sure-fire victory for the Mighty Windbreaker. Little does she know, her fake mission will inadvertently awaken zombie skeletons, turning her ruse into a dangerous reality.

Lana sets the crew on a quest to the Lost Isle of Giants using a living compass to navigate, but when the worm inside goes missing the Mighty Windbreaker becomes lost in the Mist of Mistrust. Lana and Bo launch an investigation to find the worm, but as the mist thickens, so does Lanas paranoia that everyone is guilty.
Jeff deals with a gross bug reality.
Clarence and Sumo go on a school trip.

programmes.t: The Wonderfully Weird World of Gumball
programmes.d: Gumball and Darwin attempt to make a big impression at the coolest party of the year with the most praise-worthy entrance the world has ever seen.

programmes.t: The Wonderfully Weird World of Gumball
programmes.d: Anais starts aging prematurely due to the stress and pressure of looking out for the rest of her stupid family.

programmes.t: The Amazing World of Gumball Single Story

In an effort to impress the kids Donut Cop takes them for a ride-along in his cop car and gets carried away, progressively breaking the law himself. He soon proves that the tiniest offense can indeed snowball into complete lawlessness!

programmes.t: The Amazing World of Gumball Single Story
programmes.d: Darwin starts sneezing repeatedly and it seems he cant stop. The Wattersons figure maybe hes allergic to something. After a few guesses, they come to the conclusion that he is allergic to stupidity. Being surrounded by stupid people, this is something of a problem. And they need to find a solution before Darwins increasingly explosive sneezes destroy the town.

Plucky is named ruler of a kingdom, and the toons visit his castle as he ascends the throne. Before long, Plucky exerts power over his friends, Sweetie tries to overthrow the monarchy, and Hamton lives out his fantasy of the landed gentry.
Inspired by a commercial, the Titans visit Dr. Light and Dr. Moon to learn how to make extra money.
Cyborg and Beast Boy realize that what they order to eat at a diner might have much bigger consequences.

programmes.d: Gumball and Darwin use Mollys time-halting power (because shes so boring) to avoid an after school beatdown by Tina.

Sweetie competes in a cat vs. bird competition but faces pressure to win at all costs. Hamton and Babs go into soccer mom-mode cheering her on, while Plucky, at the Loo Bru, takes over Dizzys shift to prove hes more selfless than Buster.
A glimpse at the wild, secret adventures Clarence undertakes each day before the rest of us, and the sun, get up.

Its wintertime in Aberdale and Clarence is convinced his winter wish for snow in Arizona will come true! However, his classmate Belson along with his grumpy cousin Gary Mooch, are a little tougher to convince.

Nicole and the kids soon tell him what hes done and try to figure out a way to avoid the police manhunt and return the cash.

And Dad thinks that grown-ups do. They decide the only way to figure it out is to spend a day in each others shoes, no matter if theyre too-small, too-big, or high-heeled.

programmes.t: The Amazing World of Gumball Single Story

But what Gumball doesnt see coming is the awkward social repercussions of the hug...

programmes.t: The Amazing World of Gumball Single Story

When they realise that making some final happy memories with Mr Robinson is not enough for them, they decide to stop him leaving, by sabotaging the sale.

programmes.t: The Amazing World of Gumball Single Story
programmes.d: Mum and the kids depart for their hard days work, leaving a seemingly lazy Dad half-asleep on the sofa. Mum has given him one very simple job: buy mayonnaise. However, Dad manages to turn this mundane task into an epic quest, showing that his daily routine isnt as inactive as his family imagines.

programmes.t: The Amazing World of Gumball Single Story
programmes.d: When the Wattersons arrive at the mall for a day of shopping, they struggle to find a space in the parking lot. They search for a space everywhere - using all their intelligence, cunning and trickery - but as the day goes on, the desperate hunt for a space becomes more important than the trip to the mall itself.

After the upgraded Bobert malfunctions one too many times, the kids decide to reinstall his old operating system. But will they be able to downgrade from the upgrade and get their old friend back?

programmes.t: The Amazing World of Gumball Single Story
programmes.d: The Amazing World of Gumball revolves around the life of Gumball Watterson, a 12-year-old cat who attends middle school in the fictional city of Elmore. Accompanied by his adoptive goldfish brother and best friend Darwin, he frequently finds himself involved in various shenanigans around the city, during which he interacts with his other family members - sister Anais and parents Nicole and Richard - and an extended supporting cast of characters. With relatable themes and a unique cast of characters, The Amazing World of Gumball exemplifies the funny, amazing, sweet and optimistic side of kids everyday life. Injected with a good deal of humor and unpredictable nonsense, Gumballs world reflects the modern family and everyday issues that kids understand.

programmes.t: The Wonderfully Weird World of Gumball

programmes.t: The Amazing World of Gumball Single Story
programmes.d: Mom has forced Dad to install a password on the computer. The pop-up clue advises them that the password is the name of Dads favorite child. After trying "Gumball" and "Darwin" unsuccessfully, they discover the answer is, in fact, "Anais". They are determined to become Dads favourites by any means necessary, even if it means undermining each other, plotting against Anais or driving a wedge between mom and dad.

programmes.t: The Amazing World of Gumball Single Story
programmes.d: Gumball and Darwin are offended when Mom calls them "procrastinators", once shes told them what it means. They promise to take the trash out by the time she gets home. As the clock slowly counts down, they discover that they will go to extraordinary lengths, no matter how inane, to avoid the task in hand.

When Lana abandons the crew mid-quest to go on a personal quest to complete her collection of Flap Shack collectibles, Lana finds herself at the centre of a deadly trap while the crew of the Mighty Windbreaker struggle without her during an active volcano evacuation.

When Lana is left tongue-tied after verbally sparring with her fellow questers, she goes to Chopov to learn the epic art of roasting in an effort to be cool, only to insult half the Guild, and even her own crew.

When the Daycare gets wrecked due to a storm and raccoon damage, Craig decides to hold a talent show with kids donating toys to get in - having promised that the Sing-Along Friends will show up, Craig tries to stop his audience getting annoyed by getting the other acts to perform while he is waiting for them... but how long will they be prepared to wait?

A solar eclipse means that its Opposite Day at the Creek, resulting in everyone suddenly acting and saying the opposite of what they are doing - the Stump Kids therefore hide in Wrens bunker, which is set in a different time zone, and make a contraption to allow them to move the sun out of alignment and put things right.

Duane tasks Craig with looking after a box for him while he and Nicole go to a spa for their anniversary - however, when Craig takes Jessica to the Creek, he accidentally loses the box and he and his friends are forced to go look for it.

The Stump Kids head to the Baby Casino for JPs birthday and discover another piece of the cube - although they manage to acquire enough chips to win it, they are accused of cheating by Big Baby and kicked out, so Craig decides to play Big Baby at ultimate tic-tac-toe while the others steal the cube...
Inspired by a commercial, the Titans visit Dr. Light and Dr. Moon to learn how to make extra money.
Cyborg and Beast Boy realize that what they order to eat at a diner might have much bigger consequences.

programmes.t: The Wonderfully Weird World of Gumball
programmes.d: Gumball and Darwin seek healthy food for their family, but an evil food consortium controls the industry.

programmes.t: The Wonderfully Weird World of Gumball
The Amazing World of Gumball Single Story
programmes.d: After being framed for feeding coffee to the squirrels in the park, Gumball proclaims that Mrs Robinson is pure evil. Darwin tells him that theres no such thing as pure evil, and sets out to prove that Mrs Robinson wasnt born evil, she just became that way because of a trauma in her past. But when he learns the true darkness of her nature, he decides she deserves her grand comeuppance.

programmes.t: The Amazing World of Gumball Single Story
programmes.d: "When Alan ditches Gumball to do something more fun Gumball is desperate to track him down and make him pay for his betrayal. Gumball has through gritted teeth prepared a special dinner for Alan to apologise for the way he has treated him in the past. When Alan cancels he is overjoyed until a post on Elmore Plus reveals Alan lied about his Mom being sick and is having a day of fun with his family instead. Gumball tracks down the traitor to give him a piece of his mind but when he finds out his Mom really is sick he has to find a way to make it up to him.
After losing countless jobs because of the kids, MacArthur shows up at the school seeking revenge.
When Chefs Mom and Leshawnas Grandmother drop their loved ones off at the same time, it kicks off a dangerous competition for who is the most caring mother-figure.
Duncan is rattled when Chef, tired of having his car destroyed, buys a new one that is completely indestructible.
When two new kids show up at the daycare Duncan and Leshawna take issue with, not what makes them different, but what makes them similar to the newbies.
When Cody keeps screaming in his sleep Gwen and Duncan take a trip into Codys dreams to see what is scaring him.

Animated comedy following the adventures of Craig and his two friends Kelsey and JP as they explore the wilderness of the creek together. After spending a day in the cold, the Stump Kids return to Craigs house to warm themselves up - they are promised grilled cheese sandwiches but have to wait before they are ready, so they decide to find things to do in the house while they do so like drinking hot cocoa, playing video games, and taking part in a game of hide and seek.

Animated comedy following the adventures of Craig and his two friends Kelsey and JP as they explore the wilderness of the creek together. It is time for the annual Winter Creeklympics, and the Stump Kids are doing everything they can to win a gold medal at them for the first time - however, when every new event sees them seem to get farther and farther away from winning anything, the group ultimately learn that it is better to have fun than simply take all the glory.

Animated comedy following the adventures of Craig and his two friends Kelsey and JP as they explore the wilderness of the creek together. Craig builds a "snowme" and convinces Kelsey and JP to do the same - this results in some interesting new houses as Bobby joins in the fun, but they soon decide that they need to get jobs to maintain their new lifestyles. Feeling that they are overworked, they decide to fight back against their "boss" - an inflatable clown - but then into more trouble...

Animated comedy following the adventures of Craig and his two friends Kelsey and JP as they explore the wilderness of the creek together. Craig is on his own when he discovers an abandoned playhouse in the middle of a frozen lake and ends up running into his rival Wildernessa - the pair end up bickering and arguing over their differing views when they are left stranded after the lake ice breaks, but a huddle in the playhouse to escape the cold proves to be highly beneficial for the duo.

When the crew grow tired of Dr. Chopovs snerk soup, they stop to stock up on croconuts, but Lana gets enticed by a plant that promises to taste like all your birthdays, only for Boreas to have a very strange reaction to it.

After a month of questing, Lana looks forward to a Guild VIP Pass. But upon their return to the Guild, she discovers that she failed to fully declare their heroics. With no completed missions, Admiral Lovejoy is about to expel the crew unless Lana can race against the clock to complete a quest, which Horatius connives to sabotage.
Jeff and Sumo expect no one to show at Clarences party.
Clarence Jeff and Sumo climb a really tall tree.

Lana bakes her first-ever Scooterberry cake as an offering to placate a hangry whirlpool, only to have it devoured by Sprog thanks to an oversight by Bo. Lana must navigate friendships choppy waters and whip up a replacement cake before the Mighty Windbreaker is lost at sea.

Lana is excited to show her dad her new boomerang, when Andar surprises her with a mini version of his awe-inspiring hammer. As hammer and boomerang clash (metaphorically!) Lana and Andars differing perspectives nearly get them devoured by the Arachno Queen, until Lana shows her dad she does want to follow in his footsteps, but in her own way.

Buster, Plucky, and Hamton take an aptiTOON test that yields some surprising career prospects. Meanwhile, Babs and Sweeties relaxing dorm-cation is interrupted by a mysterious smell, and they cant rest until they find the source.
Sumo devotes himself to the Sisyphean task of building a boat, defying the
Clarence and Sumo chase a lizard to unexpected rewards.

programmes.d: Darwin tries to highlight the plight of all the household objects he feels are being oppressed and maltreated by the uncaring residents of Elmore. He then decides to lead those objects in a revolt against the townspeople.

programmes.d: Nicole has decided its time to throw out the familys refrigerator. This doesnt go down too well with Richard, as its his favorite possession. When it turns out the refrigerator is also a magical storage facility for childhood emotions and memories, it makes sense that Richard is having a hard time letting go.

programmes.t: The Amazing World of Gumball Single Story
programmes.d: When Mr Robinson accidentally lets slip how little he cares for Gumball and Darwin, they react by giving him the cold shoulder. Surprisingly Mr Robinson misses them and tries to win back their friendship. After a few failed attempts, Gumball and Darwin realise that Mr Robinsons heart is protecting him, so they give it an intense affection overload.

programmes.t: The Amazing World of Gumball Single Story
programmes.d: Its Halloween in Elmore. As the kids go trick or treating we see what everyone in town is up to. The ghosts and ghouls are finding it increasingly difficult to scare children, and are only scaring part-time. Can Gumball and Darwin help them get their scare back?

programmes.t: The Amazing World of Gumball Single Story
programmes.d: Gumballs old BFF, Fuzzy, turns up on his doorstep. Darwin struggles to accept that there was someone before him and fails to contain his jealousy. But is Darwin right to mistrust Fuzzy? Does Fuzzy actually have sinister motives for reconnecting with his old BFF?

He decides the best way to ride it out is to just say nothing until his new girlfriend gets it our of her system. But sometimes not making a sound is harder than it sounds.

programmes.t: The Amazing World of Gumball Single Story
programmes.d: When Bobert finds hes infected with a virus called love.exe he asks Gumball and Darwin to give him a definition for the word love. When they try to explain it through song, it gets him no closer to an answer, so he asks the other residents of Elmore to give their versions of what love means to them.

programmes.t: The Amazing World of Gumball Single Story
programmes.d: Gumball Darwin and Carrie team up to convince their fellow students that the school is haunted. At Halloween show and tell the class isnt buying Gumballs story about Gargaroth The Devourer until Carrie fakes a terrifying haunting. The kids convince the school to hire them as ghost exterminators and take their payment in Halloween candy. But when it turns out Gargaroth is real suddenly Gumball is expected to be the towns saviour.

programmes.t: The Amazing World of Gumball Single Story
programmes.d: Gumball is walking in the same direction as Hot Dog Guy and with each step it becomes increasingly awkward. Gumball is too busy singing about ketchup to notice hes about to bump into Hot Dog Guy. They manage to get through an awkward moment only to discover theyre travelling in the same direction. Their journey becomes increasingly awkward until a delusional mall cop tries to arrest them and in the process allows them to finally go their separate ways…

programmes.t: The Amazing World of Gumball Single Story
programmes.d: Elmore residents are going missing and the cause of these disappearances may be closer to home than Gumball and Darwin think. A breaking news report tells the Wattersons that their neighbour is among the several mysterious disappearances happening across Elmore. Their search for clues leads them to find a strange egg which they soon discover belongs to their own Evil Turtle. The family realise that its their responsibility to track down their pet before she and her brood do more damage to the town.

They try everything to figure out what it is, but when they do they find out there are bigger secrets to learn about their neighbour than just his name...

programmes.t: The Amazing World of Gumball Single Story
programmes.d: Gumball finds Pennys laugh annoying, but cant think of a way to tell her without offending her. When he discovers that Principal Brown has the same problem with Miss Simians morning breath, they decide to swap problems to save themselves from getting dumped.

The Docs run out of puff and decide to cut some corners. All it takes is a sharpie, as it happens; just change a wanted poster to offer a huge reward, and bingo! The public are gonna do your work for you. Weirdly quickly, a hard-boiled granny shows up with Lamput under her arm. Things turn ugly when she actually expects to be paid the reward. Most unreasonable. Not even an odd-jobs montage can pay this giant bill; the Docs get desperate and turn to crime, which works about as well for them as it usually does. Specs and Skinny end up in the clink, the granny pockets a heap of cash, and Lamput is yet again the one that got away.

programmes.t: The Amazing World of Gumball Single Story

They discover that under Pennys shell is an emotional shape-shifting inner self. Pennys father is determined for Penny to keep it hidden but Gumball encourages her to show the world who, or what, she really is.

However they accidentally leave it at school, and take home a clump of Principal Browns hair instead. Surprisingly they discover it makes an excellent pet! When they realise they have left the real Chris Morris at school, they have to race to find him before their error is discovered.

programmes.t: The Amazing World of Gumball Single Story

programmes.t: The Amazing World of Gumball Single Story
programmes.d: The Wattersons complain about their day and order a pizza from Larry. When they call to complain about their late pizza its the final straw for Larry and he quits all of his jobs. Elmores fragile commercial structure collapses and the citizens revert to a more primitive apocalyptic state.

After lamenting her many chores on the MWB, Lana inadvertently swaps bodies with her luxury-loving nemesis Horatious Hoffenstance, and gets to live his lavish lifestyle. However, as Horatious discovers the joys of Lanas loyal friends and family, Lana quickly learns that Horatiouss seemingly perfect life on the Golden Goose isnt all its cracked up to be.

Lana is on a crucial quest to transport an ice sculpture of Admiral Lovejoy to a celebration for her in Weymouth, when the figurehead of the Mighty Windbreaker breaks off and is lost at sea. Unfortunately for Lana, this triggers Andar and the crews superstitious phobia of sailing without a figurehead, putting Lanas quest and the Mighty Windbreaker in great peril.

Craig finds a rock in the Creek that Raj says looks like the one that his grandmother Nila Ba used to play on when she was a little girl in India - Craig and Raj then decide to sneak her out of the house, against the wishes of Rajs father Ravi, while Kelsey and JP follow them.

The Stump Kids find a piece of the cube at the Lost and Found, but its owner Salma refuses to give it up as they technically do not own it - when Salma then reveals that she lost a fish toy named Bubbles, JP sets out to retrieve it as he was the one who found it may years ago.
