Animated adventure series for younger viewers that follows a team of five superpowered vehicles - Bam, Redbird, Bibi, Batwing and Buff - as they are thrust into hijinks and action while learning important lessons about teamwork, friendship, and so much more helping Batman, Robin and Batgirl. Redbird gets excited when he learns that Batman and Robin are taking him and Bam for a drive up the coast - unfortunately, the Joker and his van Prank show up unexpectedly and ruin Redbirds beach day plans.

Animated adventure series for younger viewers that follows a team of five superpowered vehicles - Bam, Redbird, Bibi, Batwing and Buff - as they are thrust into hijinks and action while learning important lessons about teamwork, friendship, and so much more helping Batman, Robin and Batgirl. When the Joker floods the Batcave, the Batwheels evacuate and relocate to a nearby parking garage - as they adapt to their new home, they learn important lessons about family and making the most of things.

Animated adventure series for younger viewers that follows a team of five superpowered vehicles - Bam, Redbird, Bibi, Batwing and Buff - as they are thrust into hijinks and action while learning important lessons about teamwork, friendship, and so much more helping Batman, Robin and Batgirl defend Gotham City. When Batman refuses to race with the Joker, Prank goads Bam into a rematch - can Bam learn not to give in to the bullys dares and take the high road?

Animated adventure series for younger viewers that follows a team of five superpowered vehicles - Bam, Redbird, Bibi, Batwing and Buff - as they are thrust into hijinks and action while learning important lessons about teamwork, friendship, and so much more helping Batman, Robin and Batgirl defend Gotham City. After struggling to solve a riddle from Riddlers helicopter Quizz, Redbird must learn to speak up and share his ideas with the Batwheels if they hope to figure out the villains scheme.
The Looney Builders build a float to lead the Flower Parade, but Porky wont settle for anything less than Porky Perfect. F
The Looney Builders are hired to build a rollercoaster for Looneyburg. -F
Sam Sheepdog hires The Looney Builders to build him a salon. Sam offers his custom cut only to learn that different folks want different styles.

Bugs Bunny Builders is a fun and exciting preschool series featuring your favorite Looney Tunes working at a construction company. Join Bugs Bunny, Lola Bunny, Daffy Duck, Porky Pig and Tweety Bird as they use their amazing vehicles to take on the looniest builds ever. Along the way, theyll learn valuable lessons and never give up because The Looney Builders always get the job done!

Tom, Jerry and Butch watch a Smack-n-Cheese Cheesy Cheese Puffs advertisement and when they hear, "supplies are running out!", the rivalry between the trio reaches new heights as they compete to get what they imagine to be the very last bag of Smack-n-Cheese Cheesy Cheese Puffs.

Tom, Jerry and Butch watch a Smack-n-Cheese Cheesy Cheese Puffs commercial and when they hear, "Supplies are running out!", the rivalry between the trio reaches new heights. / Jerrys Uncle Harry is coming for a visit. / Toodles folks are coming for a visit. Problem is they think shes married with kittens. Tom plays the role of husband and volunteers Jerry and Tuffy to play their kittens. Director: Darrell Van Citters,.

Animated series starring the famous cat and mouse duo. Toodles folks are coming for a visit; the problem is that they think shes married with kittens. Tom happily plays the role of husband and volunteers Jerry and Tuffy to play their adorable kittens, but complications ensue when Toodles dad doesnt take to Tom, her mom coddles Jerry and Tuffy a little too much, and Toodles ex-boyfriend Butch learns that his girl got hitched.
Spike recruits Tom and Jerry to help him remove a bad tooth so he can avoid the vet.

Tom finds himself in a series of unfortunate events as he tries to retrieve Jerry after he is led to believe his pal has been eaten by a hungry bear cub. Tom must avoid the mama bears wrath, but oblivious to Toms plight, Jerry enjoys the perks of circus life.

Jerry has mocked-up a "Reward if Found" poster with Toms picture and the address listed as the neighbour with the ferocious dog. After being brought back "home" by Good Samaritans, Tom has to try to escape from the house with his nine lives intact and avoid being brought back!

Priya has arrived from Earth to complete a school project about Mars. Priya is unfamiliar with the planet and a bit nervous about its huge dust storms. Ella, Slippy and Madhu convince her she needs to visit Mars.

Animated series for younger viewers. Madhu has special presents for Ella and Slippy, to celebrate the anniversary of the day they met. But when Ella and Slippy say they cant hang out, Madhu is sent off with only Maggie for company.

Slippy has heard a rumour that the abandoned outpost the gang plans to visit is haunted so he brings his ghost detector goggles, just in case! Ella assures him that there are no such things as ghosts, but then odd things begin to happen.

Animated series for younger viewers. Ellas mum is a hall of fame Enceladus 500 race champion, and Ella wants to be just like her! She plans to skate, scooter race and geyser jump her way to a championship trophy!

Ella and Slippy have been practicing their rock-climbing skills, so that they can tackle the recently formed, huge crater on Saturns moon, Enceladus. Ella, however, prefers relying on her space boots to get her to the top of the rock wall

Many of the riverbank folk have their eyes on Toads ripe pears. Ratty offers to guard the pear tree all night but in the morning, all the pears are gone thus mounting an investigation to find the culprit.

When Rattys brother comes to visit, Ratty has to pretend that he lives in Toad Hall as he had claimed in his letters. / When Mole goes to find Hedge in the Wild Woods without his glasses, the weasels play a nasty trick on him and Mole falls into a ditch with Hedge.

When Mole goes to find Hedge in the Wild Woods without his glasses, the weasels play a nasty trick on him and Mole falls into a ditch with Hedge. How will they ever get out to find Badger and get Moles glasses fixed?

Toad boasts he can get to the seaside in his hot air ballon and be back in time for his grand dinner. He soon gets into trouble and crash lands in the Wild Woods. Trapped in the ropes and branches of trees, Toad is helpless to stop the weasels marching on Toad Hall.

Toad boasts he can get to the seaside in his hot air ballon and be back in time for his grand dinner. He soon gets into trouble and crash lands in the Wild Woods. / Toad commissions a portrait of himself from Mrs Otter but cant keep still enough for her to paint him. Will there ever be a portrait of Toad hanging in Toad Hall?

When did Mr. Bean first meet his teddy bear? Did he really learn to drive his mini at the age of ten? Could he possibly have known his battle-axe of a landlady when she was a sweet and blushing bride? Bean takes us on a journey into the past, answering these questions and giving us an inkling as to what made him the man he is today.

Mr. Bean finds himself lumbered with an unwanted pet in the form of a four-legged ball of pink fur with piggy eyes and a penchant for earthworms. Encyclopedias leave him none the wiser as to the identity of the pesky creature but Bean cant bring himself to just abandon it. The puzzle is eventually solved after a picnic in the park and a raid on the local pet shop.

Mr. Bean forgets the golden rule: never fall asleep in the bath when youve got a chicken in the oven. So what romantic meal can he quickly rustle-up for his luckless girlfriend, Irma Gobb? The cheese from the mousetrap? The flower from the vase? A meal is eventually provided by an uninvited guest.

The nasty tennis player is big and angry and wants his ball back. The one Mr. Bean managed to throw on the roof of a house across the road. Paralysed with vertigo sixty feet up on a windowsill, he is eventually brought to earth by the helpful intervention of a neighbours pet gerbil.

Priya has arrived from Earth to complete a school project about Mars. Priya is unfamiliar with the planet and a bit nervous about its huge dust storms. Ella, Slippy and Madhu convince her she needs to visit Mars.

Animated series for younger viewers. Madhu has special presents for Ella and Slippy, to celebrate the anniversary of the day they met. But when Ella and Slippy say they cant hang out, Madhu is sent off with only Maggie for company.

Slippy has heard a rumour that the abandoned outpost the gang plans to visit is haunted so he brings his ghost detector goggles, just in case! Ella assures him that there are no such things as ghosts, but then odd things begin to happen.

Animated series for younger viewers. Ellas mum is a hall of fame Enceladus 500 race champion, and Ella wants to be just like her! She plans to skate, scooter race and geyser jump her way to a championship trophy!

Ella and Slippy have been practicing their rock-climbing skills, so that they can tackle the recently formed, huge crater on Saturns moon, Enceladus. Ella, however, prefers relying on her space boots to get her to the top of the rock wall
Its another hot and humid day in Singapore. Cool down with Tom and Jerry by the beach as they chase each other into a frenzy for an icy delight - Ice Kachang!

When Mole goes to find Hedge in the Wild Woods without his glasses, the weasels play a nasty trick on him and Mole falls into a ditch with Hedge. How will they ever get out to find Badger and get Moles glasses fixed?

Toad boasts he can get to the seaside in his hot air ballon and be back in time for his grand dinner. He soon gets into trouble and crash lands in the Wild Woods. Trapped in the ropes and branches of trees, Toad is helpless to stop the weasels marching on Toad Hall.

Toad boasts he can get to the seaside in his hot air ballon and be back in time for his grand dinner. He soon gets into trouble and crash lands in the Wild Woods. / Toad commissions a portrait of himself from Mrs Otter but cant keep still enough for her to paint him. Will there ever be a portrait of Toad hanging in Toad Hall?

When Toad throws out an old chair, he immediately regrets it but the Weasels have now claimed it. Can Toad and his friends persuade them to return it to him? / Badger finds an old dirty painting of the Riverbankers ancestors as a choir and Ratty offers to put a new choir together.

Badger finds an old dirty painting of the Riverbankers ancestors as a choir and Ratty offers to put a new choir together. Chief and Tinker wont let him Smudge join. Only a full restoration of the painting will reveal who really was in the The Wild Wood Warblers!

The Rangers cabin is equipped with an ultra-effective pest detector capable of sensing the presence of an intruder then chasing it out by emitting a wave that instructs the creatures brain to leave at once. Grizzy and the Lemmings are no longer able to stay inside until they discover that the boxs remote-control device allows you to select which type of animal will be spared or targeted by the wave.

Grizzy finds himself unwillingly caught up in a race between two teams of Lemmings. When he understands the stakes, he tries to win but loses. Grizzy has his pride: he wants a return match. He decides to build his own racing machine to challenge the Lemmings soapbox.

The Lemmings have placed giant remote-controlled hydraulic jacks under the cabin to transform it into a life-sized rolling ball game. Grizzy who in inclined to seasickness tries to put things back in place. The cabin tips over into empty space.

Grizzy is disturbed during his nap by a few uncatchable flies which buzz incessantly around his head. When he realizes that the carnivorous plant upon which the Lemmings are playing rodeo feeds off flying insects, he decides to confiscate it and use it as an anti-fly weapon.

The Lemmings have unearthed a crate of competition boomerangs. They rapidly become pros capable of disarming Grizzy at a distance and ejecting him from the cabin with disconcerting ease. To compete with the precision of the Lemming boomerangs, Grizzy decides to learn archery and becomes the Canadian William Tell.

programmes.t: Superthings Rivals of Kaboom, Kazoom Power
programmes.d: Kid Kazoom and Multy discover the origin of Kaboom City, the Kazoom, and the confrontation between Enigma and Professor K thanks to the mysterious Equilibra.

Animated series for young viewers that follows Bugs Bunny, Lola Bunny, Daffy Duck, Porky Pig and Tweety Bird as they use amazing vehicles to take on the looniest construction jobs while learning lessons along the way. The Looney Builders are hired by Mac and Tosh Gopher to build an underground home for them, but Daffy cant remove rocks from the area fast enough and fails to ask for help.
The Looney Builders are hired by Yosemite Sam to build a dude ranch. Sam hurries the crew along, negatively impacting their work.

Bam must learn to adapt and try something new as hes tasked to dive the Bat Big Rig all the way to Star City, while the Legion of Zoom chases after him. / On Halloween Night, Poison Ivy brings all the pumpkins in Gotham City to life, creating an army of candy-gobbling Snack-O-Lanterns! F  3/3
Krypto smells something special in a holiday package, and in his eagerness to grab the gift he makes a mess of Metropoliss festivities.
When a black cat crosses Kryptos path, hes determined to catch it before Halloween night is through.

A little baby goat butts his head through a distant wall of the estate and starts nibbling the grass. At first, he helps Tom with the yardwork but then causes chaos throughout the manor. Tom and Jerry are left to deal with the kid.

On another scary night in the castle, The Invisible Cat wants nothing more than to catch mice. After it picks up and carries Jerry and Tuffy, Tom is really confused (and spooked) to see the two mice "magically" float through the air! When Tom accidentally smacks The Invisible Cat in the face and knocks Jerry and Tuffy free of his hold, it sparks a slapstick fight between the two cats.

In a musical detective episode, Tom and Jerry must figure out the disappearance of famed stage actress Kitty Caterwaul before the opening night of her new musical. / Tom and Jerry try to break in to a chicken coop to steal eggs and end up defending the chickens from unknown intruders. / A Halloween party turns the house upside down, as Tom and Jerry try to raid the party food. Director: Darrell Van Citters,.

A Halloween party turns the house upside down, as Tom and Jerry try to raid the party food. / When Tom accidentally wakes up zombies he gets help from Jerry Van Mouseling. / Tom accidentally eats Spikes food and starts acting like a dog, soon the whole gang starts eating food that causes them to act crazy. / Tom and Jerry work together to protect a family of baby eagles from a mountain lion. / When Tom accidentally loses Tyke, he must distract Spike from looking for him. Jerry must try to find Tyke from a litter of identical looking puppies. / Tom switches heads with a nine-foot monster but he still wants to chase Jerry instead of villagers. Director: Darrell Van Citters,.

Rick and Ginger wake up late and, in their hurry, they accidentally put dog food in Toms bowl and cat food in Spikes. This causes Spike to behave like a cat and Tom to act like a dog. Although theyre confused at first, they soon eat other types of food and discover how it makes them act.
Tom and Jerry work together to protect a family of baby eagles from a mountain lion.

Specs and Skinny celebrate a brand new arrival to the family: a body lotion that delivers incredible speed to its wearer. Yay Science! The boys quickly include the speed lotion in their morning routine, because testing inventions on yourself is always a good idea. Then its time to get out there and nab Lamput once and for all. Results are mixed. On the one hand, the "zoom oil" certainly works. On the other hand, these nerds arent really used to having a body that can actually do things. Conclusion: the docs still fail, only this time they fail really quickly. At least they get that round the world trip they were dreaming of.

The nasty tennis player is big and angry and wants his ball back. The one Mr. Bean managed to throw on the roof of a house across the road. Paralysed with vertigo sixty feet up on a windowsill, he is eventually brought to earth by the helpful intervention of a neighbours pet gerbil.

Beans sweet tooth leads him to despair when he bites off a bit more than he can chew. He is tormented by the toothache from Hell - and embarks on a hilarious mission to pull out this menace. Beans DIY attempts fail to succeed, and he is left with no other choice but to visit the dreaded dentist. But can Bean brave the Dentists chair? Or will the dentist despair when faced with Beans antics?

After (accidentally) rescuing a kitten from a tree Mr. Bean is set to have his picture in the newspaper! The photographer arrives with the grateful lady cat owner, the scene is set, smiles all round…but then disaster strikes when Bean is continually upstaged by… his hair.

As Mr Bean settles down to watch his favourite TV programme he hears loud noises from next-door. He moves from house to garden but cant escape the relentless cacophony of trumpets, electric drills, and screaming babies. Beans mind turns to thoughts of revenge….

Envious of all the attention his landlady is receiving because of a broken leg, Mr. Bean decides to "break" his leg too. When he ends up in hospital under the care of the Matron from Hell he discovers there are some kinds of attention even he doesnt enjoy.

Doc Specs and Lamput finds themselves stranded on an island. Will they be able to get home? Or maybe they will make a new home on the island. Has Doc Specs traded Doc Skinny for Lamput as his best friend? Crazier things have happened!

Turns out constant, relentless failure can put a strain on a relationship. Specs and Skinny are no exception, and when yet another chase ends in embarrassment, misfortune, and physical injury, the Docs finally fall prey to "irreconcilable differences". For a shapechanger, Lamput sure doesnt like change; its like mum and dad are fighting. Lamput sets about trying to help the Docs patch things up. When conventional methods fail, our orange buddy is forced to subvert the very fundamentals of animated storytelling. Lamputs perseverance finally pays off. The Docs have an epiphany: this blob trying to fix our friendship? Obviously thats the real enemy.
Lamput is caught but makes a new friend, Tuzki who comes to his rescue!

Grizzy gets a nice big bite on the end of his fishing line. While he concentrates hard to strike his catch, the Lemmings divert the fish to tow them on a kite. Grizzy tries to sabotage their improvised kitesurfing game to recover whats rightfully his, until a sharks fin appears on the horizon!

The cupboards of the log cabin are hopelessly empty and Grizzys belly is rumbling. Through his binoculars, he observes the overexcited Lemmings slipping all sorts of small metal objects into the slot of… a Yummy vending machine!?! The bear joins them on the pontoon. If only they could find some coins to make the machine work. Maybe the solution is to find the booty indicated on the treasure map they unearthed on the beach?

After accidentally breaking his favorite sofa, Grizzy spots a cozy fishing cabin on a neighboring island. He requisitions the Lemmings canoe to get there but discovers that the new cabin is dilapidated and lacking all comfort. The poor bear had been deluded by a poster. However, a fabulous yacht is moored nearby. It catches both his attention and that of the Lemmings, who have just disembarked on the island!

The Lemmings have fun taking potshots at sand statues depicting Grizzy. Outraged, he catapults them far into the distance. Grizzy takes advantage of their absence to erect a monumental sculpture of himself. But just as he takes a selfie in front of the sculpture, Grizzy realizes that the Lemmings have laid hands on… a pirate cannon!

After being hit over the head, the Lemmings become hypnotized by a fitness poster and take themselves for sports coaches. They are determined to forcefully train Grizzy, who would much rather lounge around than do push-ups and squats. But the Lemmings new personality makes them particularly overbearing.

Nothing seems to be biting Grizzys fishing rod and the bear is in despair. Suddenly he spots a fabulous swordfish swimming in the lagoon. The bear is already licking his chops, when he sees the Lemmings straddling the fish in a rodeo game. From inside the cabin he uses as a mooring post, Grizzy manages to snare the swordfish and is about to pull it in, but the Lemmings are riding it toward the high seas. Each party tugs hard. And the cabin starts to slide…

Because of an injured foot, Rick stays home with Gingers mother, Rosemary, taking care of him. Rosemary brings her infamous fat-free-dairy-free whole wheat gravy, and she quickly puts Rick, Spike and Tom on nutritious diets. Antics and fights break out as Rick and the pets crave real food.

Tom and Jerry take a case for Toodles cousin in Hawaii, hoping to sneak in some rest and relaxation, but its no vacation. The cousins missing pineapple plant is only the starting place of the investigation as Tom and Jerry track down the culprit in this tropical environment.

Tom is chasing the mice around the haunted house when midnight strikes, and he finds himself face-to-face with a green-faced beast whos just as surprised to encounter Tom. Its soon revealed to be Toodles, whos a good witch brewing magic beauty products. Although Tom is enchanted at first, things stop going smoothly when he helps with her potions.

Tom and Jerry investigate the case of a missing pineapple in Hawaii. / Tom uses an unlucky bone to scare Spike and Jerry. / The Tom and Jerry detective agency take a case to locate a young tortoise who is secretly training to become a prize boxer. / Spike trains Tyke for a puppy dog competition with the help of Tom and Jerry. / Jerry gets a visit from his very hungry city cousin, Count De Calories, who goes wild with all the food in the manor. / The Tom and Jerry detective agency takes the case of a dog whose fortune cookie has gone missing. Director: Darrell Van Citters,.

Tom and Jerry take a case from a mother tortoise to find out where her son Seymour is sneaking off to at night. They discover Seymour is self-training to win a championship boxing match, planning to pay off bills with the prize money so his mom can quit the car wash. When he offers Tom and Jerry a cut of the money to keep his secret, they take it and agree to train him—but it wont be easy.

Ginger and Ricks vegetable garden is growing, and they need a way to keep out the gophers. Ginger says traps are cruel, but Tom can handle the task! However, things start getting out of hand when a lady gopher falls in love with Jerry, and the two plan a garden raid together.

When did Mr. Bean first meet his teddy bear? Did he really learn to drive his mini at the age of ten? Could he possibly have known his battle-axe of a landlady when she was a sweet and blushing bride? Bean takes us on a journey into the past, answering these questions and giving us an inkling as to what made him the man he is today.

Mr. Bean finds himself lumbered with an unwanted pet in the form of a four-legged ball of pink fur with piggy eyes and a penchant for earthworms. Encyclopedias leave him none the wiser as to the identity of the pesky creature but Bean cant bring himself to just abandon it. The puzzle is eventually solved after a picnic in the park and a raid on the local pet shop.

Mr. Bean wants to learn skateboarding but hurts himself on his first try. Meanwhile Miss Wince is showing off her new mobility scooter at Mrs. Wickets. Bean is entranced. / Mrs. Wicket becomes annoyingly inconsolable when Scrapper goes missing - calling for him at all hours of the day and night. Bean cant get any sleep! / Bean discovers Mrs. Wickets nephew and Bruiser Jnr swapping football stickers and decides that he wants to fill up a sticker album too. / Mr. Bean thinks hes just dug up a valuable coin in the back-garden and goes rushing off to the Museum to have it valued.

Bean discovers Declan giving Irma a lift in his swanky new SUV. Bean is unimpressed until Declan shows off all the cars features. Undeterred Bean professes his car superior. Declan issues a challenge - to see which car Irma will choose for her lift back to work. Bean decides his car may need a little "pimping" …

Mrs. Wickets Nephew is staying with her when he wins two tickets to an Outward Bound course. She refuses to go but then ropes in Bean to look after the child. The two start a competition to see who will win the trophy. Bean is a relentless competitor winning everything up until the point things start getting out of hand …

The animated antics of the hapless bumbler. Mr. Bean and Teddy have no plans and so decide to stay in bed all day - when Mr. Bean is determined to ensure that his feet cant touch the ground, he pushes the bed around with a broom instead. Mr. Bean has to find ingenious ways to make his tea and toast for breakfast, brush his teeth, and the even bigger challenge of ordering a pizza and collecting it from downstairs without getting out of bed!

The animated antics of the hapless bumbler. After seeing a flashy electric go-kart Mr. Paliwal has bought for his daughter Divya, Mr. Bean and Billy build their own using items around Mrs. Wickets garden - when Mr. Bean and Mr. Paliwal are unimpressed with Billy and Divyas driving skills at the go-kart track, they take the karts for a "proper" race around the park. Meanwhile, Mrs. Wicket is on the warpath when she finds things missing from her house...

Mr Bean and Teddy head to the bowling alley with a free voucher, but Mr Bean finds it a lot harder than he expected. Seeing a little girl with a smaller ball, he borrows it, thinking it will be easier to use. But instead, he gets his fingers stuck in the ball and he causes havoc trying to pull them out.

The animated antics of the hapless bumbler. Mr. Bean is at a farmers market with Irma at her knitwear stall - they are right next to a man selling novelty teapots. Mr. Bean is instantly smitten with a green car-shaped one, but he cant afford it - when he visits a food truck that has laid out free samples, he hatches a plan to swipe them and sell them on his own stall so he can raise the cash for the teapot of his dreams!

The Docs are on holiday and board a high-speed train only to realise that Lamput is also on the same train, except hes in First Class! During the train journey, the Docs try to get from Coach into First Class but are refused entry by the trains Captain. They then disguise themselves as train staff and finally get in, ready to capture the unsuspecting Lamput.

The orange blob is down at the Museum, nerding out about ancient Egypt, when the Docs show up and ruin Lamputs day. Darn science geeks. No respect for culture. A superior knowledge of history keeps Lamput one step ahead of the blue boffins - how many times can two chemists get kicked out of the same Museum? The Docs sneak back into the exhibition disguised as mummies. They learn the hard way that a disguise can be TOO good; they get locked into a glass box overnight. Lucky break, though; this is the night when a renowned jewel thief tries to steal the museums precious treasures. Lamput and the Docs get tangled up in the heist. The rest is history.

The Docs and Lamput are excited because the FunFair is in town! But after the Docs cause havoc for the Carnival Clown during his juggling act, Lamput tries to make things right. The Clown is delighted in his new found friend and the two of them disappear into his House of Fun, with the Docs giving chase. But not all is as it seems inside the mysterious fun house, and the Docs have to come up with a cunning plan to capture Lamput and avoid upsetting the Clown any more!
The Looney Builders are hired by Mayor Leghorn to build the venue for the Looney Games. They soon become overwhelmed by the job and must ask for help.

While on vacation, The Looney Builders befriend Coco the Crab and offer to build her a mini-resort. They shrink down for a micro-build and must rely on the islands natural resources to get the job done.

Tom is taking selfies and enjoying a sweet snack at the candy shop, when Jerry and Tuffy sneak up and eat his strawberries. Tom proceeds to chase after them, but Tuffy falls into the claw machine. Jerry tries to save him, and Tom fishes them out. Tom makes Tuffy cry and apologizes by feeding him sweets.

Animated adventure series for younger viewers that follows a team of five superpowered vehicles - Bam, Redbird, Bibi, Batwing and Buff - as they are thrust into hijinks and action while learning important lessons about teamwork, friendship, and so much more helping Batman, Robin and Batgirl defend Gotham City. When MOE wants to know what its like to be a member of the Batwheels, the robot gets more than he bargained for when Bam invites him along for an exciting mission to stop Poison Ivy.

Animated adventure series for younger viewers that follows a team of five superpowered vehicles - Bam, Redbird, Bibi, Batwing and Buff - as they are thrust into hijinks and action while learning important lessons about teamwork, friendship, and so much more helping Batman, Robin and Batgirl defend Gotham City. Bam brings Catwomans Catmobile Kitty to life so the Batwheels can have even teams for a game of Bat-Ball, but Kitty is too wild to be contained despite Bams best attempts to tame her.
An oompah land retelling of the Rumplestiltskein story.

Tom and Jerry save King Arthurs kingdom from and evil sorcerer Morgan. / A bet between two farmers over who can raise the biggest pig goes haywire for the farm hands. / An ancient flying machine is discovered in Postlewaite Manor. / An oompah land retelling of the Rumplestiltskein story. / A couple of tricksters use Lil Quacker as their "magnificent" side show act in order to bilk the locals out of their cash. / From the security of his treehouse, Tom wages battle with Spike and Jerry. Director: Darrell Van Citters,.

Quackers cousin, and penguin named Tux, makes life miserable for Tom and Jerry when he insists on trying to devour the fish in Ricks new aquarium. / Spike recruits Tom and Jerry to help him remove a bad tooth so he can avoid the vet. Director: Darrell Van Citters,.
A lost little lamb appears at Maudes farm.
A Tom and Jerry take on the Johnny Appleseed story.
Tom is mistakenly placed in a shelter for homeless animals and forced to join the shelters rock-n-roll while Jerry lives the life of Riley back home.

Its the middle of the night and Tom plays makeshift instruments creating loud music that wakes up Jerry. Jerry tries to put an end to Toms concert with no success. Tuffy wakes up and goes along with the music. Jerry decides to join in on the fun.

Mr Bean decides to take Teddy on holiday to the seaside. But when he arrives at his hotel a spoilt little girl wants Teddy all for herself. And her protective dad only wants the best for his princess. An on-going tussle ensues between Mr Bean the little girl and her Dad resulting in a chase across the seaside town and onto the pier. No one comes between Mr Bean Teddy and their "relaxing" holiday!

The animated antics of the hapless bumbler Mr Bean. Mr Bean is left in peace when Mrs Wicket goes off on her holidays. This means Mr Bean has free access to her daily newspaper. Every time he goes down to collect it from the letterbox it has disappeared. Someone is taking it, but who? Mr Bean is determined to nab the mysterious newspaper stealer and uses a range of ingenious homemade traps in his quest to catch the sneaky thief.

Mr Bean is trying to find a nice quiet place to read his book so he sets off for the Library. But instead of reading he becomes distracted by some funny online videos he sees on the Librarys computer. Before he knows it Mr Bean is recording his own video which is uploaded for everyone to see. Things start to go crazy when people check out his funny video and his popularity takes off. But does Mr Bean enjoy being in the public eye and how long will his celebrity last?

Nipping to the shops for a few provisions becomes a nightmare when a mile-long shopping list from his landlady and a clapped out trolley with a wonky wheel conspire to ruin his day. Subscribing to the theory that bigger is better, he constructs his own shopping trolley incorporating a petrol mower, pram wheels and an extra pair of hydraulic hands.

It might be Sunday, but Specs just wont let up: his obsession with Lamput knows no weekends. Skinny, on the other hand, knows just how to spend his day off. Asleep, thats how. Even if his workaholic buddy insists on dragging him through the usual pointless search. The call of a morning coffee wins the day, though; when Specs finally agrees to take a break, he discovers that even orange blobs like a sleep-in. And pancakes. Lots of pancakes.

Grizzy chases after the Lemmings, who have loaded a jar of Yummy into their remote-control driven car. Where the bear gets to the gas station, he destroys the vehicle and recovers the chocolate spread. The rodents find little mini-cars and chase Grizzy all the way back to the cabin, where they trip him up and intercept the coveted jar. Helpless, the bear sets out after them, until he runs into a tank truck filled with Yummy.

To recover the jar of Yummy that Grizzy confiscated from them, the Lemmings decide to infest the bears coat with fleas. The scheme works and Grizzy starts scratching himself frenetically. Nonetheless, the bear manages to counter their diversion and expulse the rodents. When they land on a sorcerers hut, the Lemmings take possession of a magic scepter that has the ability to temporarily shrink objects. Now microscopic-sized, the rodents return to the cabin to get their paws on the chocolate spread.

Grizzy wakes up starving but the cupboards are empty. While the Lemmings play nearby with an elephant, the bear swipes their peanut reserves. Not at all pleased, the rodents decide to recover their bag of nuts and use the elephants trunk like a powerful vacuum cleaner to hurl all sorts of objects at Grizzy. In the heat of the battle, the Lemmings discover a pack of fabulous peanut and chili pepper cookies that seem to make the pachyderm ultra-powerful.

Grizzy is about to start eating the last remaining food in the cabin: cocktail snacks. But the sly Lemmings get there first. A fight breaks out but is quickly cut short by the unexpected visit of a wart hog. The pig devours the crackers and then, using his snout, detects a forgotten old package of candy under the bed, which he also proceeds to gobble down. Everyone realizes that the creature has the ability to find food. Grizzy and the Lemmings fight over who will follow the beast to track down food.

In order to win a trophy filled with Yummy candies, Grizzy and the Lemmings take part in a safari photo competition on an animal reserve. They must capture the portraits of a number of wild animals that live in the park. It requires all their cunning to approach the elephant, wart hog and bat and take photos for the contest. But when it comes to the super-speedy, blue-necked ostrich, its a different kettle of fish!

While Grizzy organizes a picnic alongside the pond, the Lemmings steal his jar of Yummy using water balls to discreetly advance underwater. Despite their equipment, the bear surprises the Lemmings and traps the rodents inside a waterproof ball which he throws far into the distance. An ostrich mistakes the ball for her egg and sits on it, waiting for the egg to hatch. The Lemmings are adopted by this new mother who is prepared to do anything to satisfy her offspring!

programmes.t: Superthings Rivals of Kaboom, Kazoom Power
programmes.d: Colormad and Crusty use their Demolition Battle Vehicle to launch heroes through the air. Mighty Moo and Lockster initiate a chase to stop them.

Everyones favorite cat-and-mouse duo, Tom and Jerry, is joined by Nibbles Mouse, aka Tuffy, as they ring in a wild wintertime celebration in the all-new holiday special Santas Little Helpers. Jerry and Tuffy are living the good life in Santas workshop -- until the day Tom is rescued by the Claus family! With Tom in the house, theres nothing but merry mayhem at the North Pole. But when the dust settles, can the comically destructive duo work together to save Christmas and learn the true meaning of friendship? Directed by Darrel Van Citters and written by Jim Praytor and Robert Zappia, this wacky Tom and Jerry outing features the voice talents of Tom Kenny, Gary Cole, Simon Helberg, Julie Wittner, Grey DeLisle and Rachael MacFarlane.

Ginger and Rick have installed a new birdbath, and Little Quacker has taken up residence in it. Ginger forbids Tom from going out in the back and has Rick move Spikes house. The dog and cat soon unite to return Little Quacker to the pond without Ginger finding out theyre responsible for sending him packing.

Little Quacker develops the ability to sing like Pavarotti. But when Tom plots to use this to win a prize on the "Pets With Talent" TV show, Little Quacker refuses and Jerry covers for him. As things continue to snowball, its up to Tom to attempt saving the day.
Tom stars in a documentary that mischaracterises his daily activities.

Mr Bean and Teddy head to the bowling alley with a free voucher, but Mr Bean finds it a lot harder than he expected. Seeing a little girl with a smaller ball, he borrows it, thinking it will be easier to use. But instead, he gets his fingers stuck in the ball and he causes havoc trying to pull them out.

The animated antics of the hapless bumbler. Mr. Bean is at a farmers market with Irma at her knitwear stall - they are right next to a man selling novelty teapots. Mr. Bean is instantly smitten with a green car-shaped one, but he cant afford it - when he visits a food truck that has laid out free samples, he hatches a plan to swipe them and sell them on his own stall so he can raise the cash for the teapot of his dreams!

The animated antics of the hapless bumbler. Mr. Bean is watching Clint Chiseljaw - his favourite action TV show - with Billy when Mrs. Wicket orders her nephew downstairs to finish his chores. Inspired by Clints catchphrase - "Nobody gets left behind" - Mr. Bean tries a variety of different daring plans to break Billy out of Mrs. Wickets flat, but none of them work until he hits on the perfect plan... or so he thinks!

Mr. Beans landlady is hopping mad on finding molehills on her lovely croquet lawn. Bean looks to get hammered if he does not rid the old lady of the cuddly little half-blind culprit. He fails dismally with his eccentric mole extermination methods and ends up simply taking the pesky rodent for a ride.

The Lemmings have a grand old time tearing down their Kapla block buildings, which they rebuild just as fast. Jerry sneaks into the party set up to steal some cheese while Tom is sleeping. Tom wakes up and chases Jerry across a table filled with all kinds of food. During the chase, Tom eats a melon which turns him into a sphere shape and Jerry eats a piece of cheese which turns him into a triangle shape.

The Legion of Zoom are tired of always losing and therefore decide to take a leaf out of the Batwheels book and use teamwork to pull off a daring heist - will they be able to co-operate?

Animated adventure series for younger viewers that follows a team of five superpowered vehicles - Bam, Redbird, Bibi, Batwing and Buff - as they are thrust into hijinks and action while learning important lessons about teamwork, friendship, and so much more helping Batman, Robin and Batgirl defend Gotham City. Redbird sacrifices his stealth muffler tech to sound as loud as the other Batwheels, but his modifications backfire when Robin needs his stealthy skills to catch the elusive Catwoman.

Bugs Bunny Builders is a fun and exciting preschool series featuring your favorite Looney Tunes working at a construction company. Join Bugs Bunny, Lola Bunny, Daffy Duck, Porky Pig and Tweety Bird as they use their amazing vehicles to take on the looniest builds ever. Along the way, theyll learn valuable lessons and never give up because The Looney Builders always get the job done!
Follow the adventures of Bugs Bunny and his friends in this Halloween special episode.
After a hot cocoa disaster, Santa Claus hires The Looney Builders to build him a new toyshop in time to save Christmas.

Tom finds himself in a series of unfortunate events. / Hi-jinx ensue when Jerry decides to mock-up a "REWARD IF FOUND" poster with Toms picture on it and listing the address of the neighbour with the ferocious dog as Toms home... / Tom and Jerry must work together to prove Bog is overkill. / Jerry Tom and Spike need rescuing on their snowy vacation. / Tom gets a can of Cat Cop a spray that creates a tiny cop. / Its Spikes birthday, but Rick has forgotten about it. Tom and Jerry work together to give the pooch a birthday to remember, but unfortunately their every effort backfires. Director: Darrell Van Citters,.

Toodles folks are coming for a visit. Problem is they think shes married with kittens. Tom plays the role of husband and volunteers Jerry and Tuffy to play their kittens. / Spike recruits Tom and Jerry to help him remove a bad tooth so he can avoid the vet. / Tom finds himself in a series of unfortunate events. / Hi-jinx ensue when Jerry decides to mock-up a "REWARD IF FOUND" poster with Toms picture on it and listing the address of the neighbour with the ferocious dog as Toms home... / Tom and Jerry must work together to prove Bog is overkill. / Jerry Tom and Spike need rescuing on their snowy vacation. Director: Darrell Van Citters,.

Huldie sends Tom and Jerry into the woods to find a baby dragon who they befriend on the way home. When Hildie tells them she plans on making a special baby dragon dinner Tom and Jerry work together to save him.

Its Spikes birthday! Hes been counting down the days. Every year, Rick goes all out to make it special but not this one. He has forgotten. Seeing how sad Spike is, Tom and Jerry work together to give the pooch a birthday to remember. Unfortunately, their every effort backfires, making the pathetic pooch sorry he was ever born. This one ends happily, we promise.

A mockingbird has taken roost in a tree outside Gingers window, where it sings the sweetest songs whenever shes around. When she leaves for work, however, the mockingbird earns its name by mocking Tom and Jerry relentlessly. When her nest full of eggs hatches and the insults really take flight, Tom, Jerry and even Spike, decide its time for these birds to fly the coop!

When the Witch Sisters are brewing up their latest concoction, they discover that their stash of walnuts has disappeared. Needless to say, Jerry is enjoying the "nuts" of his labor, while Tom is sent out to gather more nuts. When Tom steals the winters supply of nuts from a feisty flying squirrel, things go from bad to worse. Not only does the squirrel take Jerrys stash, but the irate rodent launches an attack on Tom inside the house.

Animated series for younger viewers. One little rock can cause a chain reaction by hitting bigger and bigger pieces. Ella inadvertently sends a rock on a collision course for Saturns moon, Prometheus. Thats where Ellas dad has gone to work on a stalled vehicle.

After hurting her leg, Ella has to take it easy for an entire day. Does she have the patience to sit and rest for that long? When she runs out of activities at home, Ellas dad offers to take her along on one of his towing operations

When Glitchs arm shorts out, Ellas dad has the right tools to fix him. While hes at it, Dad shows off his latest creation, a Super Towing Arm. Slippy is impressed and Glitch is more than happy to try it on for size

Ella is enlisted to pet sit Buttons, a friends dog, on the very day she has to finish a school project about Venus. She decides to take on both responsibilities at once by taking Buttons with her to the planet to capture the final piece of video footage she needs. When the thunder from the storms around Venus scare Buttons into accidentally detaching himself from his pod, he lands on the pla net and disappears. Ella and her friends search frantically on the hot planet but cannot find him. Its Buttons who finds Ella! Ella admits she shouldnt have taken her furry friend with her, but at least she learned new facts for her project!
Slippys Dad insists he get rid of all his inventions to free up some space. Slippy cant bear to, so decides to store them on the dark side of Mercury.

When Toad throws out an old chair, he immediately regrets it but the Weasels have now claimed it. Can Toad and his friends persuade them to return it to him? / Badger finds an old dirty painting of the Riverbankers ancestors as a choir and Ratty offers to put a new choir together.

Badger finds an old dirty painting of the Riverbankers ancestors as a choir and Ratty offers to put a new choir together. Chief and Tinker wont let him Smudge join. Only a full restoration of the painting will reveal who really was in the The Wild Wood Warblers!
Toad volunteers to babysit Portly for the Otters only to find babysitting isnt as easy as it looks.

Hedge normally hibernates but this year she is determined to see Christmas. Although shes not much use in decoration preparation, she is able to bring peace and understanding to all when there is a dispute over the Christmas Tree.
Tinker comes up with a cunning plan for herself and Chief to be delivered as a parcel into Toad Hall.

Beans sweet tooth leads him to despair when he bites off a bit more than he can chew. He is tormented by the toothache from Hell - and embarks on a hilarious mission to pull out this menace. Beans DIY attempts fail to succeed, and he is left with no other choice but to visit the dreaded dentist. But can Bean brave the Dentists chair? Or will the dentist despair when faced with Beans antics?

After (accidentally) rescuing a kitten from a tree Mr. Bean is set to have his picture in the newspaper! The photographer arrives with the grateful lady cat owner, the scene is set, smiles all round…but then disaster strikes when Bean is continually upstaged by… his hair.

As Mr Bean settles down to watch his favourite TV programme he hears loud noises from next-door. He moves from house to garden but cant escape the relentless cacophony of trumpets, electric drills, and screaming babies. Beans mind turns to thoughts of revenge….

Envious of all the attention his landlady is receiving because of a broken leg, Mr. Bean decides to "break" his leg too. When he ends up in hospital under the care of the Matron from Hell he discovers there are some kinds of attention even he doesnt enjoy.

When the thunder from the storms around Venus scare Buttons into accidentally detaching himself from his pod, he lands on the pla net and disappears. Ella and her friends search frantically on the hot planet but cannot find him. Its Buttons who finds Ella! Ella admits she shouldnt have taken her furry friend with her, but at least she learned new facts for her project!
Slippys Dad insists he get rid of all his inventions to free up some space. Slippy cant bear to, so decides to store them on the dark side of Mercury.
Thomas and Friends get to pair with the professionals in the Sodor Cup Games, where theyll test their skills - starting with an egg race. Will everyone make it to the finish line with all their eggs?
Toad volunteers to babysit Portly for the Otters only to find babysitting isnt as easy as it looks.

Hedge normally hibernates but this year she is determined to see Christmas. Although shes not much use in decoration preparation, she is able to bring peace and understanding to all when there is a dispute over the Christmas Tree.
Tinker comes up with a cunning plan for herself and Chief to be delivered as a parcel into Toad Hall.

Chief agrees to accompany Toad on a day trip out in the car but only if he can drive. Chiefs plan is to steal the car by throwing Toad out but his erratic driving sees them perched precariously over the river bank. Can they ever be friends now?
When Hedge learns to play chess, she fails to win gracefully. Soon no-one will play with her!

Exasperated by the Lemmings who prevent him from watching his favorite TV show in peace, Grizzy catapults them out of the cabin. One of them passes through the northern lights and undergoes a strange mutation: he now has the power to control metal with his mind.

A strange new object figures prominently in the cabin: a big wall clock that resembles a Swiss cuckoo. Grizzy instantly falls in love with the regular "tick-tock," which comforts and soothes him. But when the hands strike noon, figurines come out and perform a song and dance with a flourish. The Lemmings notice that by turning the hands of the clock manually, it can be noontime every two seconds.

Woken with a start by a nightmare filled with Lemmings, Grizzy stumbles on the Rangers dream machine. Its a headphone set where you can program the theme of your choice before falling asleep within seconds for a night filled with sweet dreams. But who could possibly sleep soundly surrounded by Lemmings who want their fair share too?

Grizzy happens onto an old American India medallion bearing the symbol of the wind. He who wears it has the power to command air streams. Grizzy would be quite content to never leave the sofa again and control things from a distance, but the Lemmings want it to create fantastic new games that literally blow you away.

A magic Amerindian top modifies the mental age of anyone who watches it spin. From now on, Grizzy has the mind of a 10-month old baby. The Lemmings rapidly realize that dealing with an overgrown baby - no matter how sweet or adorable - is not exactly restful.

programmes.t: Superthings Rivals of Kaboom, Kazoom Power
programmes.d: Colormad and Crusty use their Demolition Battle Vehicle to launch heroes through the air. Mighty Moo and Lockster initiate a chase to stop them.

Animated series for young viewers that follows Bugs Bunny, Lola Bunny, Daffy Duck, Porky Pig and Tweety Bird as they use amazing vehicles to take on the looniest construction jobs while learning lessons along the way. Bizzy Buzzards mum hires the Looney Builders to build a new nest for her family, but all sorts of problems are created for the crew when Bizzy wants to help but keeps getting in the way.

While on vacation, The Looney Builders befriend Coco the Crab and offer to build her a mini-resort. They shrink down for a micro-build and must rely on the islands natural resources to get the job done.

Grundy, a giant monster truck, causes chaos as he stomps around Gotham and creates a mess. Hes too powerful for the Batwheels to stop, but Buff finds a friendly solution to end the city shaking shenanigans.

Grundy, a giant monster truck, causes chaos as he stomps around Gotham and creates a mess. / When MOE creates a new, super sparkly vehicle paint, the Batwheels decide to put on a talent show to see who will get a shiny new makeover! -F  3/3

Spike orders Tom and Jerry to watch Tyke while hes away, but instead Tom takes the opportunity to chase Jerry in the backyard. Suddenly, Tyke is nowhere to be seen and the front gate is wide open! Tom and Jerry must find the pup in time or face Spikes beating.

Tom visits a haunted castle where a lovely gardener raises monster plants. / Ginger tries to make Tom get some exercise and makes Tom take an unwanted walk. Jerry and Tuffy take advantage of the empty house. / Tom doesnt take a mummy in a haunted castle seriously, until hes impossible to outrun. / Tom accidentally eats Spikes food and starts acting like a dog, soon the whole gang starts eating food that causes them to act crazy. / Tom uses an unlucky bone to scare Spike and Jerry. / Tom switches heads with a nine-foot monster but he still wants to chase Jerry instead of villagers. / Jerry uses Toms fear of cucumbers to startle him at every turn. Director: Darrell Van Citters,.

Tom and Jerry go to a pool party at Toodles house and compete against Meathead and Butch in various pool games. / Tom switches heads with a nine-foot monster but he still wants to chase Jerry instead of villagers. / Tom gets a can of Cat Cop- a spray that creates a tiny cop that chases Jerry around. / When the gang find an air hockey table in the garage, its cats versus mice in an epic game of hockey! / Tom and Jerry try to fix a hole in a wall before Rick comes home from vacation. / A smooth talking Dr. Hyde tries to sell Tom a suspicious potion that will turn him into a monster. Jerry and Tuffy run from Dr. Hydes monster alter-ego . Director: Darrell Van Citters,.

Spike the bulldog comes to Tom and Jerry, complaining he is being harassed by unknown creditors, ex-girlfriends, and other problems due to identity theft. They take the case on and go in search of who could be using Spikes name. It quickly becomes equally confusing for them to sort out.

A fast-talking sales cat named Dr. Jake L. appears to Tom from a trap door in the floor, selling "Ache-Eee Bones" tonic. However, when the doctor sees Jerry and Tuffy, he instantly turns into the slobbering Mr. Hyde-Cat and chases them, but then changes back to the doctor. Tom wants to buy the tonic but soon finds out whats happening with the visiting cat and tries to get rid of him.

When Rick and Ginger argue on their anniversary, Cupid decides to get involved. However, he gets a head injury in a chase between Tom and Jerry and forgets who he is. Now its on Tom and Jerry to remind Cupid of his identity and help Ginger and Rick stop fighting.

Whilst trying to redecorate the hall, Bean is obstructed at every turn by his landladys vile one-eyed cat. Bean pops it in the dustbin to keep it out of the way for a while. Just his luck that its rubbish collection day.

Nipping to the shops for a few provisions becomes a nightmare when a mile-long shopping list from his landlady and a clapped out trolley with a wonky wheel conspire to ruin his day. Subscribing to the theory that bigger is better, he constructs his own shopping trolley incorporating a petrol mower, pram wheels and an extra pair of hydraulic hands.

When nursing an injured magpie in his room, Mr. Bean learns something the rest of us already know: magpies cant help stealing anything that sparkles. When the police arrive to investigate the theft of his landladys jewellery, its not just Mr. Bean that needs to take flight.
Mr Bean is forced to look after his worst enemy.

Mr. Bean is delighted with his new "ship in a bottle" until it mistakenly ends up on a milkmans float. He frantically pursues his prize possession, only to see it disappear into a milk bottling plant at the local dairy. Getting it back promises to be a mission of the impossible.

While trying to escape from the Docs at a small sea side town, Lamput meets a lonely sea monster. Lamput attempts to help the sea monster makes friends but all his plans backfires. Now the locals are enraged, and the docs take the opportunity to stir up an angry mob to take down the creature and catch Lamput in the process! Not unless Lamputs new friend has anything to say about it.

The Docs go out en masse to catch Lamput, there is a mishap with a bucket of grey paint, and no-one notices the extra Doc on the van-ride back to the Lab. Lamput-in-disguise is overwhelmed by the scale of the Labs operations - but soon enough proves to be pretty sharp at this Doc business. To catch a Lamput, youve gotta think like a Lamput, see. Lamputs so good at science-ing that soon enough poor old Specs and Skinny are sacked with extreme prejudice. Lamput cant stand watching his old buddies kicked out on the street. If only folks would believe the newest Doc: under this grey exterior, there beats a heart as orange as orange can be.

The Docs latest invention generates identical versions of themselves and create a whole mob of "Duplicate" Specs and Skinnies to catch Lamput! However, the device becomes faulty, and the Duplicates cant be turned off. Now the Docs are stuck with annoying copies of themselves who are turning their lives upside down!

The Lemmings discover that several drops of Tabasco sauce poured into a rock fault releases powerful sprays of steam that propel them high into the sky on a pot lid. Except that the entire volcanic island shudders each time the drops are poured. Grizzy, who has decided to take a nap in his hammock, confiscates the bottle before realizing that the Lemmings have an entire stock !

The Lemmings have decided to organize a race with two sand yachts they found on the beach. The only thing missing, is a worthy adversary. They put Grizzy, who was taking a nap, on one of the yachts without waking him up. And the race is off. Grizzy wakes up in shock onboard his sand yacht.

Grizzy has run out of ideas to open his coconut until he sees the Lemmings new friend the crab open one with a simple snip of the claw. He confiscates the crustacean and uses it to take the tops off his coconuts. As they fight over the crab, the characters discover a remote-control device in a secret grotto that operates a giant crab. Grizzy takes over the controls, but the Lemmings want to play with the joystick too!

A helicopter takes off from the beach, leaving behind installations for a TV game, namely lots of food supplies - which are locked up. To access the keys and the food, participants must win team tests under the surveillance of a drone. The Lemmings are the yellow team. The red team is comprised of Grizzy, an oar, and a flabbergasted crab!

While trying to avoid the Lemmings outboard speedboat, Grizzy punctures his air mattress and is propelled into a hidden grotto where he finds a conch decorated with Maori symbols that can control whales. Grizzy returns, proudly straddling his cetacean and chases the Lemmings from his peaceful spot. But the Lemmings imagination is equal to the size of this potential new playmate!

While arguing over a jar of Yummy, Grizzy and the Lemmings happen upon a polar bear cub who is crying. When the little bear sees them, he wails even louder. Annoyed by his sobs, Grizzy and the rodents try to pacify him, but nothing works. After feeding and changing him, the baby finally falls asleep. How can they pick up their Yummy battle without waking the cub?

Skullie tells Tom that he wont have to sweat a visit from one of the spooks tonight. However, Tom is soon drawn to a full-length mirror that causes no shortage of trouble. As he gets pulled into the mirror, an evil reflection cat trades places with him. Tuffy and Jerry enter the mirror world too and must fight their reflection selves for survival.

Spike trains Tyke for a puppy dog competition with the help of Tom and Jerry. / Jerry gets a visit from his very hungry city cousin, Count De Calories, who goes wild with all the food in the manor. / The Tom and Jerry detective agency takes the case of a dog whose fortune cookie has gone missing. / Tom and Jerry have a magical chess match in a haunted castle. / Toodles the Witch mesmerizes Tom in a haunted castle, and poses a threat to Jerry and Tuffy. / A ghost in a painting casts an evil spell on Tom, but it backfires when Tom can no longer get hurt chasing Jerry and Tuffy. Director: Darrell Van Citters,.

After Tyke digs up, Hammy, Spikes lucky bone, Spike reburies it right away because its bad luck to remove it. Soon afterward, Tom gets a set of toy dog bones that do tricks, and he teases Spike and Tyke with them. When the whirly-bone buries itself and unearths Hammy for a second time, Spike recruits the other animals to help prevent the bad luck he expects.

A ghost paints a flattering portrait of Tom, but Tom is stingy with his payment and the ghost casts a spell on the portrait. Strange things start happening as the portrait absorbs injuries and calories that should be affecting Tom. However, soon Jerry and Tuffy figure out whats going on and use it to their advantage.

When Rick and Ginger are asked to dog-sit for a friends French poodle, Sabrina, Tom is initially on his guard, but soon hes practically eating out of her hand. Next, Spike falls for Sabrina and does everything he can to impress her with how kind he is to Tom. How long will everyones behavior be affected by Sabrinas presence?

Tom, Jerry and Tuffy have a run-in with a moving suit of armor. The knight scares Tom away, but Jerry makes a brave stand because he thinks the knight is Tom in disguise. Jerry eventually trips the suit of armor and finds out its inhabited by three kittens. Relieved at first, the pets soon realize that battling one haunted knight is nothing compared to battling three real-life kittens.

Mr. Bean forgets the golden rule: never fall asleep in the bath when youve got a chicken in the oven. So what romantic meal can he quickly rustle-up for his luckless girlfriend, Irma Gobb? The cheese from the mousetrap? The flower from the vase? A meal is eventually provided by an uninvited guest.

The nasty tennis player is big and angry and wants his ball back. The one Mr. Bean managed to throw on the roof of a house across the road. Paralysed with vertigo sixty feet up on a windowsill, he is eventually brought to earth by the helpful intervention of a neighbours pet gerbil.

Mr Bean peers through the window of the opening party of an art exhibition and sees free snacks being handed around - yum! But hes told by the bouncer that he needs to be smartly dressed. So he sneaks into the artists studio and paints a tuxedo onto himself. This time hes let in, but will Beans fake painted suit last long enough for him to get his free food?

Mr Bean is trying to watch the motor racing on TV, when Mrs Wicket interrupts him to offer a deal - revamp her garden with new paving and ornaments, and hell get a months rent for free. Bean reluctantly agrees, but when he sees Mr Paliwal finish a personal training session and keen for more, he offers him a new workout… doing all Mr Beans work for him while he watches the racing! Win, win!

Mr Bean is bored of queuing for a trampoline park, so secretly bounces in through a window using a trampette. But he soon gets on the wrong side of a young show-off boy who keeps stealing Teddy and throwing him in hard-to-reach spots. To settle their row, they agree on a race around the trampoline park - first place wins Teddy. Will Mr Bean triumph before hes chucked out for jumping the queue?

Irma is struggling to sell items from her knitwear stall at the market, so sends Mr Bean to collect a sheep costume he can wear to attract customers. Once at the fancy dress shop however, Mr Bean gets stuck in the sheep costume and has to travel back to the market wearing it. Things go from bad to worse when Mr Bean takes a short cut across the field and gets caught up in a flock of real sheep!

The animated antics of the hapless bumbler. Mr. Bean spots a rare book - the Teddy Bear Haunting - in a bookshop, but its too expensive to buy. When Mr. Bean secretly tries to read it in the shop - until hes thrown out - someone else then buys the book to his dismay and so he follows the buyer around trying to read over his shoulder. Will Mr. Bean manage to get to the end of the book before getting spotted?

Mr Bean and Teddy are enjoying a day at the arcade, when Mr Bean gets carried away with the dance machine, knocking Teddy onto the floor. Teddys picked up, put on a trolley of stuffed toys and figurines - and soon enough, hes been put in the claw machine as a prize! Mr Bean has run out of coins, so has to find a way of winning Teddy back without looking like hes cheating!

Mr Bean and Teddy are looking forward to seeing a once-in-a-lifetime comet - but it wont appear until 4am! He tries to stay up, but its useless - he keeps dropping off. So instead, Mr Bean decides to go to bed and set an alarm - yet he over-winds the clock and it breaks! With all the shops closed, his only option is to build his own complicated version to make sure he doesnt miss the comet…

Mrs Wicket makes Mr Bean drive her to the hospital to get her ingrown toenail seen to and asks him to wait. Mr Bean gets bored, and on a wander around the hospital he finds a spare doctors outfit with stethoscope - great Teddy - Ill give you a check-up! But a nurse spots him, and thinking hes a new doctor Mr Bean is asked to visit patients. How long can he keep it up before hes found out?

Lamput, The Docs, The Thief and Droopy are all approaching the end of a typical day - the Docs are chasing Lamput, the thief has achieved the perfect gallery art heist and Droopy has finished his day at the office. But an unexpected collision causes confusion when their briefcases get muddled up and they each end up with each others belongings. Its not long before they find out about the mistake, but who has whose stuff? And how will they get it back?

Specs and Skinny get the day off from Lamput chasing, and receive a super important assignment: go to the train station, and pick up the Boss beloved mom. The Boss really needs to reassess his delegation choices.

The Docs pursuit of Lamput takes them to the North Pole, where Lamput is taking photographs of arctic wildlife. The Docs decide to disguise themselves as various animals to get close to Lamput, only to be thwarted each time by the same animals theyre pretending to be, including a polar bear mother and her cub.
Pete Puma hires The Looney Builders to build a roller disco for Looneyburg. F
The Looney Builders are hired by Petunias Grandpa Oink to upgrade his farm. F
Bugs tries to play music for the crew on their lunch break, but his "boogie button" is busted.

Animated adventure series for younger viewers that follows a team of five superpowered vehicles - Bam, Redbird, Bibi, Batwing and Buff - as they are thrust into hijinks and action while learning important lessons about teamwork, friendship, and so much more helping Batman, Robin and Batgirl defend Gotham City. Everyone assumes that Harley Quinn is the culprit in a recent burglary, but Bibi and Redbird begin to suspect that she may actually be innocent as Batman and Bam pursue her.

Animated adventure series for younger viewers that follows a team of five superpowered vehicles - Bam, Redbird, Bibi, Batwing and Buff - as they are thrust into hijinks and action while learning important lessons about teamwork, friendship, and so much more helping Batman, Robin and Batgirl defend Gotham City. Buff trains with Batwing to improve his gracefulness and uses her lessons on a delicate mission against Riddler.
The gang are determined to make Rick and Ginger change their mind about downsizing and moving to the big city by making it impossible to sell the house.
A lineage check determines that Spike is descended from British aristocracy.
Tom is tricked into believing he is invisible.
Tyke undergoes a personality change after watching too many cop shows on TV.
A couple of tricksters use Lil Quacker as their "magnificent" side show act in order to bilk the locals out of their cash.

Rick buys the Suck-Up and at first Tom enjoys the machine using it to clean Jerry out of house! But when the Suck-Up takes over the house Tom and Jerry team up to defeat it. / The storm of the century is brewing - at least according to Tuffy and Jerry who are giving a little pay back to Tom for tormenting them earlier. / Its picture day for Spike and Tom but they both end up dirty and in the Laundro-mutt grooming van. Tuffy and Jerry are determined to be included in this years picture. Director: Darrell Van Citters,.

Jerry sneaks into the party set up to steal some cheese while Tom is sleeping. Tom wakes up and chases Jerry across a table filled with all kinds of food. During the chase, Tom eats a melon which turns him into a sphere shape and Jerry eats a piece of cheese which turns him into a triangle shape.

Mr Bean is obsessed by his favourite TV hero "Super Spy" and is excited when his very own Super-Spy spy kit arrives in the post. While Mr Bean is pretending to be his favourite character and delighting in all his gadgets he spots some unusual goings on in the Bruisers house next door. Naturally Mr Bean assumes the worst and sets out to rectify the situation.

Mr Bean inadvertently causes an accident which prevents Irma taking the scout troop to Big Bears Scout Camp. With the scout master and mini bus out of action Mr Bean steps in to save the day. As temporary scoutmaster Mr Bean enjoys his new role but his obsessive badge collecting wins him no friends within the group.

Irma wants a romantic break; Bean doesnt. Its too expensive. Irma kidnaps Teddy and refuses to give him back unless Bean promises to take her to Paris. / Bean wants to avoid lunch with Irmas Mum at all costs. He persuades Mrs. Wicket to let him join her on a coach trip to a concert. / Mr Bean inadvertently becomes a teacher. Can he control the unruly class? / Mr Bean finds out he is a Lord and visits his Scottish family home. But keeping a castle is a costly business.

When nursing an injured magpie in his room, Mr. Bean learns something the rest of us already know: magpies cant help stealing anything that sparkles. When the police arrive to investigate the theft of his landladys jewellery, its not just Mr. Bean that needs to take flight.

Lamput faints of thirst on a desert highway, so already its not a great day for the little orange shape-shifter. Add to that the fact that Specs and Skinny just happen by in a lockup van, and things go south pretty promptly. Specs and Skinny learn a valuable lesson: maybe if youre going to anger a morphing super-blob by throwing them in the back of a van and withholding precious water, you shouldnt do it whilst driving by a 100 foot cliff drop down to the open ocean. Hopefully these Docs are better swimmers than your average academic.

Chased by a raging elephant, Grizzy and the Lemmings are ejected from the cabin and land on a small nearby promontory. One of the rodents finds himself seated upon a throne-shaped boulder. A ray of sunlight illuminates him, and the savannah animals bow down before the Lemming king! But as soon as he leaves his royal seat, his powers disappear. Grizzy grabs the opportunity to plop down on the throne. Upon his orders, the other animals seek to provide him with every comfort, bringing the cabin, television and food closer. But the Lemmings put their feet down.

Grizzy is brutally awakened by four Lemmings who are giving a grand percussion concert near the cabin, while the rest of the group dances to the rhythm. The grumpy bear puts an end to the festivities by propelling the Lemmings into the distance. When they land, they discover a magical djembe inside the trunk of a baobab tree. When the percussionists start playing again, the Lemmings and all the other wild animals are possessed by the demon of dance!

In the midst of a heat wave, Grizzy and the Lemmings fight over the fridge. The rodents want to transform themselves into ice cubes to glide across their super curling ice slide, while Grizzy wishes merely to lie down inside the nice, cool appliance. After literally breaking the fridge in two, the Lemmings discover a container of refrigerant and create a new giant curling sheet in the savannah. But Grizzy has not given up the idea of resting in a cool spot!

Grizzy has gone all out for his dinner guest, the she-bear. But just as he is about to kiss her… Vroom! In the middle of a mad car race, the Lemmings wake him up with a jolt! Dragged out of his slumber and swept away upon a vehicle, Grizzy finishes the race in a daze. Not far away, the Lemmings find a mask that can control dreams. Once Grizzy gathers his wits, he wants only to get hold of the object and return to the she-bear of his dreams. But the Lemmings have other dreams, like high-powered racing cars.

Grizzy watches a documentary on salmon, whereas the Lemmings want to dance it up in the garage, nightclub style. TV versus music, the sonic war has begun! When a cloud passes overhead, Grizzy realizes that their respective gadgets run on electricity provided by solar panels. No more sun, no more electricity! He devises a plan whereby he will be the only one to access the energy, but the Lemmings have not said their last word!

A confrontation between Grizzy and the Lemmings leads to a room in the castle tower. The bear accidentally sets off a mechanism and discovers a large medieval magic trunk. Indeed, when placed inside, the trunk can blend two objects into one! The Lemmings are quicker and get their hands on the trunk, then set out to play with objects they have enhanced. But its Grizzy who discovers the formula that makes you ultra-powerful.

programmes.t: Superthings Rivals of Kaboom, Kazoom Power
programmes.d: Kai visits Lancelord, but the castle is besieged by the latters former disciple, Excalibad. The duel will test Kais evolutionary potential.

When Kitty Caterwaul goes missing the night before the opening of her new musical, "Kitty Foiled," her agent begs Tom and Jerry to take on the case. The search leads the detectives backstage, where they encounter chaos and no shortage of people who could have had a motive. Will the clues lead them to a culprit much closer to home?

On the edge of the village of Catsylvania, a bat snatches up Tom by his tail. He is carried off to a castle in the mountains and emerges in a full Dracula cape and fangs. The real Dracula appears and demands a snack. Tom swoops down on a tiny mouse village, scaring the villagers and carrying off a few. An angry mob with torches and rakes call on Jerry Van Mouseling to go rescue their kin.

After Ginger keeps an abandoned pet hamster unbeknown to Rick, Jerry takes its place after the hamster scurries off. However, Jerry soon gets displaced by baby hamsters that keep multiplying. Soon the situation is out of control.

Under-Butler Tom helps the Lord of the Manor have a trouble-free afternoon hunting with his guests shooting skeet, and Toms only job is to keep handing clay birds to the head butler. But Tom gets distracted when he sees Jerry and Tuffy eating the fabulous spread of food for the Lords guests! Tom is so mad he abandons his duty and rushes Jerry and Tuffy, leading to an epic chase.

When a gorgeous feline walks into the Cat and Mouse Detective Agency, Tom is immediately smitten. But someone has already stolen her heart—a heart-shaped cake made for a gangster and his fiancee on their upcoming engagement. He asked for the expensive engagement ring to be baked into the batter as a Valentines Day surprise, but the cake and the jewelry were stolen from the bakery window.

Dr. Bigby invents a transporting machine that accidentally transports Jerry and Tom to Paris where they meet Gigi and Cozette. They fall in love but are transported back. Bot and Napoleon break the machine trying to get them back and then they have to figure out how to make the machine work again. Bot falls in love with a robot named Dee and tries to fix her.

Mr Bean peers through the window of the opening party of an art exhibition and sees free snacks being handed around - yum! But hes told by the bouncer that he needs to be smartly dressed. So he sneaks into the artists studio and paints a tuxedo onto himself. This time hes let in, but will Beans fake painted suit last long enough for him to get his free food?

Mr Bean is trying to watch the motor racing on TV, when Mrs Wicket interrupts him to offer a deal - revamp her garden with new paving and ornaments, and hell get a months rent for free. Bean reluctantly agrees, but when he sees Mr Paliwal finish a personal training session and keen for more, he offers him a new workout… doing all Mr Beans work for him while he watches the racing! Win, win!

Mr Bean is bored of queuing for a trampoline park, so secretly bounces in through a window using a trampette. But he soon gets on the wrong side of a young show-off boy who keeps stealing Teddy and throwing him in hard-to-reach spots. To settle their row, they agree on a race around the trampoline park - first place wins Teddy. Will Mr Bean triumph before hes chucked out for jumping the queue?

Mr. Beans tranquillity is shattered by deafening roadworks outside his bedroom window. Threats, sabotage and subterfuge all fail to quell the cacophony until Bean has the ingenious idea of feeding the workmen into peaceful submission. But the silence ends with a bang!

When he accidentally sticks a computer microprocessor to his temple, Grizzy is transformed into an exceptionally intelligent being capable of predicting events to come far in advance. With his way above average IQ, not only will he be able to provide himself with the latest high-tech comfort, getting rid of the Lemmings should be a piece of cake.
